name: John Fetterman
subject: I'd like to tell you about my tattoos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
We both know I don’t look like a typical politician ...
| | |
---
Hey Peter, it’s John. I'm the official Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania!!!!!! 😁

We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143458/349021783/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)
Well, enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, and why I'm humbly asking for YOUR support in this race. (We're the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat in the country, so we can't take it for granted!)

**On my left arm, I have the ZIP code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143461/349021786/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2006. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June 2018, there was another tragic loss of life. My heart breaks everytime I’m reminded of that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143464/349021791/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.

**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Peter.**
In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.

In my 13 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth + art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.

We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.

Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because I believe *every* community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock.

It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own.

That promise is written on my arms. Literally. ❤️
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143467/349021795/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)
In order to build the kind of Democratic U.S. Senate campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, however, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now. A big part of that is online activists like you chipping in when you can.

**And now that I am *officially* the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate, the team and I could *really* use everyone’s help right now.**

So, I gotta ask:
**[Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer's? Every dollar helps flip these seats blue, expand our Democratic majority and send two new Democratic senators to Washington where we'll fight like hell for your community – just like we fight for ours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143471/349021805/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143474/349021815/343689270?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=)
---
Thanks for all you do. Together, I *know* we can win this.

Let’s gooooo. 🔥

John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143477/349021826/428800054?refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=&emci=73d7109e-1ce1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c3b4177b-d8e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46143479/349021834/496662621?refcode=jtk1151-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2I0MTc3Yi1kOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW7B9m7Kbfects2JKb_Xy277NqSuD8EQWAgXt-OuxtE=&emci=73d7109e-1ce1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c3b4177b-d8e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]

Hey team, do you have a minute?

We’re terribly sorry for the inconvenience, but we’re in the process of cleaning up our voter data files and need you to confirm whether you’re voting in the 2022 election. Please respond immediately: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vote-in-nov]

CONFIRM YOUR RECORD >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vote-in-nov]

A recent NPR poll showed that Republicans have the advantage with voters in the 2022 elections.

So it’s CRITICAL that Democratic voters turnout to vote this November.

Without it, we won’t be able to execute our data-driven strategy. We can’t let anti-voting rights Republicans win or our democracy is doomed.

CONFIRM NOW: Will you vote in the 2022 Election? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vote-in-nov]

Confirm Your Record >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vote-in-nov]

Thanks for your participation,

Team DASS

DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

name: Team Oakley
subject: You've got to see this, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,
On Saturday, NJ.com published a story about our fight to defeat Rep. Donald Payne Jr. and elect a real progressive to fight for us in Congress.
Here are a few highlights we thought you should see:
“House Majority Whip James Clyburn came to Newark on Thursday to boost a congressman who usually doesn’t need help at primary time. But this year, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. sought the help of Clyburn and other prominent Democrats to fend off an unusually strong challenge for re-election for a seat he’s held for a decade.”
* * *
“Matthew Hale, a political science professor at Seton Hall University, said [...] ‘ Oakley represents dynamic and perhaps generational change. ”
Rep. Donald Payne Jr. is scared, Peter. He can see how powerful our progressive movement is, so he’s calling in reinforcements, leaning on corporate donors, and doing everything he can to silence us.
But we won’t let him get away with it. The primary election is THIS TUESDAY, and with one last push from our grassroots supporters, we can win a true victory for our communities and for everyone who’s been left behind by Rep. Payne Jr. and his establishment allies.
If you’re with us, click here to chip in $27 — or anything you can — to help us finish this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=605article]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=605article] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=605article] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=605article] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=605article] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=605article] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=605article]
Without taking a SINGLE CENT from corporate PACs, Imani sent a decade-long incumbent running scared to the establishment leadership.
Now, all we have to do to win this fight is to turn out new, young, and disenfranchised voters who’ve been ignored by politicians like Payne Jr. for far too long. And you can help us do it.
Click here to chip in $27 and support our final push before the June 7th primary. And, for those of you in New Jersey, don’t forget to get out there and VOTE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=605article]
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
— Team Oakley

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kEFrxCAQhX9NcjMYNbY55LBQ9rallEKPYnQ00mhETcv--5ruFnoqDHN48z2Y9_SklZa9at1EMCGY46HHbKS0I5jJvp-1wWoeZvnYMCxXSKVLEPd5dUqGIvOH2ZKCTm2-XaaRMTb2I-GEGKLYzKkGQ9nIYWDUyLl9v4iLdKsL9ll6mFIxImURpCiLQRAg2avgaECEiL5dp6WUmBt6asi5Tga1J9DdAskVaaHbkq3yzYZc0BChrqAA5T19wvWw0fNevFDSR-lsaOjTDf9LN4QfTN72mqQSMW05gir1y_vJg3a7P8y-fn8X1RYKhFLVlxN6fTuj3_7aNOn45dbVZf5QW7OH6aeh8n_ib3fGhMY)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kEFrxCAQhX9NcjMYNbY55LBQ9rallEKPYnQ00mhETcv--5ruFnoqDHN48z2Y9_SklZa9at1EMCGY46HHbKS0I5jJvp-1wWoeZvnYMCxXSKVLEPd5dUqGIvOH2ZKCTm2-XaaRMTb2I-GEGKLYzKkGQ9nIYWDUyLl9v4iLdKsL9ll6mFIxImURpCiLQRAg2avgaECEiL5dp6WUmBt6asi5Tga1J9DdAskVaaHbkq3yzYZc0BChrqAA5T19wvWw0fNevFDSR-lsaOjTDf9LN4QfTN72mqQSMW05gir1y_vJg3a7P8y-fn8X1RYKhFLVlxN6fTuj3_7aNOn45dbVZf5QW7OH6aeh8n_ib3fGhMY) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kEFrxCAQhX9NcjMYNbY55LBQ9rallEKPYnQ00mhETcv--5ruFnoqDHN48z2Y9_SklZa9at1EMCGY46HHbKS0I5jJvp-1wWoeZvnYMCxXSKVLEPd5dUqGIvOH2ZKCTm2-XaaRMTb2I-GEGKLYzKkGQ9nIYWDUyLl9v4iLdKsL9ll6mFIxImURpCiLQRAg2avgaECEiL5dp6WUmBt6asi5Tga1J9DdAskVaaHbkq3yzYZc0BChrqAA5T19wvWw0fNevFDSR-lsaOjTDf9LN4QfTN72mqQSMW05gir1y_vJg3a7P8y-fn8X1RYKhFLVlxN6fTuj3_7aNOn45dbVZf5QW7OH6aeh8n_ib3fGhMY)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Sent to Republican Task Force subscribers.
PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46146596/349034948/333259033?refcode=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=00fb9227-e0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiOTIyNy1lMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmWylEZYI9Pt9D6jUCYt_qbm2Byaa1sn0i3XdK-ChEQ=)

| | Hey there, team! Now that we have one election victory under our belts, it’s clear that our district is ready to elect Patty Pansing Brooks. But we don’t have to wait until November to send Patty to Washington — **if we make the most of this opportunity, our first CongressWOMAN could be representing us in _just a matter of weeks._** Here’s how: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46146597/349034956/333259033?amount=50&refcode=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=00fb9227-e0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiOTIyNy1lMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmWylEZYI9Pt9D6jUCYt_qbm2Byaa1sn0i3XdK-ChEQ=) • We have not had a representative in Congress since the former congressman was convicted and resigned from office. • Our district will vote in a **_Special Election_ on June 28** to immediately fill the vacancy. The winner goes straight to Congress and will be our representative through the end of the year. • No matter the outcome of the June election, **we’ll vote for Patty again on November 8** to start a new two-year term in Congress beginning in 2023. **Friend, that means this June is our chance to flip a seat blue in Congress earlier than _any race across the nation._** _Let that sink in._ It also means Patty’s Republican opponent will be getting even _more_ donations from super-PACs and dark money groups. To keep pace through two elections, we’ll need all hands on deck. Our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to ensure Patty doesn’t fall a step behind. **[Can you pitch in a donation today to send Patty to Congress in June?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46146600/349034962/333259033?amount=50&refcode=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=00fb9227-e0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiOTIyNy1lMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmWylEZYI9Pt9D6jUCYt_qbm2Byaa1sn0i3XdK-ChEQ=)** | [CONTRIBUTE TO TEAM PATTY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46146602/349034964/333259033?amount=50&refcode=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&sourceid=1030989&refcode2=00fb9227-e0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=em_220605_electionexplained_rsnd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiOTIyNy1lMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmWylEZYI9Pt9D6jUCYt_qbm2Byaa1sn0i3XdK-ChEQ=)

clean_body: This month is our chance to flip a seat blue in Congress earlier than any race across the nation! | = | | Hey there, team! Now that we have one election victory under our belts, it’s clear that our district is ready to elect Patty Pansing Brooks. But we don’t have to wait until November to send Patty to Washington — if we make the most of this opportunity, our first CongressWOMAN could be representing us in just a matter of weeks. Here’s how: = • We have not had a representative in Congress since the former congressman was convicted and resigned from office. • Our district will vote in a Special Election on June 28 to immediately fill the vacancy. The winner goes straight to Congress and will be our representative through the end of the year. • No matter the outcome of the June election, we’ll vote for Patty again on November 8 to start a new two-year term in Congress beginning in 2023. Friend, that means this June is our chance to flip a seat blue in Congress earlier than any race across the nation. Let that sink in. It also means Patty’s Republican opponent will be getting even more donations from super-PACs and dark money groups. To keep pace through two elections, we’ll need all hands on deck. Our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to ensure Patty doesn’t fall a step behind. = | = We’ll send more updates about the Special Election soon, but in the meantime, take a look at the great resources on our new Thank you for all your support, friend! We can’t do this without you. — PPB Voter Information Hub | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vskw9t8hfN

"The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with
an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk
show.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskw9t8hfN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Will you please open this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I was one of the FIRST Republicans to officially endorse President Trump in his 2016 race.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpj74hssv7292rdag2rffbsef8dgtju3gfu6d1d0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slhm9in0sb7cion3c3iegp76c76mtj7bdblm6rm9cpkskoe1pr5ceqmepr4mhoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phlcsqr1ptimhj32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

(1) Incoming message from President Trump's endorsed candidate for Congress

__************[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0bb5nfjicrgb4tjku89j0vvj7obllehh4gu3498_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) Friend, this is Former Alaska Governor and Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for Congress, **Sarah Palin**. _**I was one of the FIRST Republicans to officially endorse President Trump in his 2016 race. **_ Mainstream "Conservatives" LAUGHED at me for this. They said he would never win and that Trump would be the WORST President in history. Now, it's not just the Never-Trump Republicans who are coming after me. _**Every outlet in the Fake News is writing a hit piece on me to destroy every hope I have of winning my race.**_ But I'm an Alaskan, I've seen bears and moose that are scarier than most of my opponents, and I would never give up on making America great again. **I know for a fact that if I quit, Democrats will destroy this country with their evil America Last policies.****I won 't let that happen.** But I can't do it alone. I need Trump's top allies on my side in order to win. **That 's why I'm working with President Trump's NUMBER ONE ally in Congress, Rep. Ronny Jackson** - he was Trump's White House physician and now he represents the most MAGA strong district in the nation, & he's a battle tested warrior who retired from the Navy as a Rear Admiral. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zint60o2051o6nqj18c7lsfsuv22mejttveslji8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) But even with our proven track record of supporting President Trump and the America First agenda, _**we 're getting demolished by Nancy Pelosi's billionaire buddies who want nothing more than to lock up President Trump and throw away the key.**_ It's why I'm coming to you first, Friend. Ronny and I have seen that you've supported Trump and the MAGA movement with everything you have. So we're coming to you one more time, in desperation to humbly ask for your endorsement & your full support. [**Will you support America First Patriots, Sarah Palin & Ronny Jackson for Congress?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4id33b9kf9latkg19bqveahet6taho3bs8dagvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) ****************************[**YES**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb211nj2rg0i4lnhjvpii035cohp62j374fahkso_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) ******************** ****************************[**NO**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zndbihhkcgdp7cphggoir2pn3aqq61d0561tqf78_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) ******************** Please, Friend, without your simple endorsement, we have no way of getting Trump back in the White House. _**So, we 're pleading: before we're forced to call it quits, will you pledge your support?**_ [**Endorse Sarah Palin & Ronny Jackson for Congress**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjkqgpqod6amiq5nm8oi95jvr5a723hoac0hf6g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) America will be destroyed without a leader like Trump back in office. That's why we're running for office - **to kick the America Last Democrats out of DC and to restore Trump 's America!** But we won't last another day without your support. Pelosi is closing in on us. If you withhold your support, Pelosi will steal our seats and steal back the majority. If that happens, the entire country will go down in flames. It's now or never, Friend. Please don't let us down. ************************[**ENDORSE NOW**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zool05knlb19t2lc8kntf47mva7lq7rek6j1hld8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm8oj1cdh2bs) **************** We hope to see your name at the top of our supporter list, _Sarah Palin
Ronny Jackson_****

clean_body: I was one of the FIRST Republicans to officially endorse President Trump in his 2016 race. (1) Incoming message from President Trump's endorsed candidate for Congress ********** Friend, this is Former Alaska Governor and Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for Congress, Sarah Palin. I was one of the FIRST Republicans to officially endorse President Trump in his 2016 race. Mainstream "Conservatives" LAUGHED at me for this. They said he would never win and that Trump would be the WORST President in history. Now, it's not just the Never-Trump Republicans who are coming after me. Every outlet in the Fake News is writing a hit piece on me to destroy every hope I have of winning my race. But I'm an Alaskan, I've seen bears and moose that are scarier than most of my opponents, and I would never give up on making America great again. I know for a fact that if I quit, Democrats will destroy this country with their evil America Last policies.**I won 't let that happen. But I can't do it alone. I need Trump's top allies on my side in order to win. That 's why I'm working with President Trump's NUMBER ONE ally in Congress, Rep. Ronny Jackson - he was Trump's White House physician and now he represents the most MAGA strong district in the nation, & he's a battle tested warrior who retired from the Navy as a Rear Admiral. But even with our proven track record of supporting President Trump and the America First agenda, we 're getting demolished by Nancy Pelosi's billionaire buddies who want nothing more than to lock up President Trump and throw away the key. It's why I'm coming to you first, Friend. Ronny and I have seen that you've supported Trump and the MAGA movement with everything you have. So we're coming to you one more time, in desperation to humbly ask for your endorsement & your full support. ************************** **************** ************************ **************** Please, Friend, without your simple endorsement, we have no way of getting Trump back in the White House. So, we 're pleading: before we're forced to call it quits, will you pledge your support? America will be destroyed without a leader like Trump back in office. That's why we're running for office - to kick the America Last Democrats out of DC and to restore Trump 's America! But we won't last another day without your support. Pelosi is closing in on us. If you withhold your support, Pelosi will steal our seats and steal back the majority. If that happens, the entire country will go down in flames. It's now or never, Friend. | | "I’m on the front lines in the fight to protect safe and legal reproductive health care. I’m taking on corporate special interests. **And I’m working tooth and nail to lower costs for Granite State families."**
---
| | "I have the privilege of serving New Hampshire in the United States Senate, where I’m **focused on making sure families like yours have the tools you need to get ahead and stay ahead."**
---
Aren't these the words of someone you'd want to keep fighting in the U.S. Senate?

| | **"This race is one of the most competitive in the country.**** A recent poll shows me down by 2 points, and I won my last race by just 1,017 votes. This means that Mitch McConnell is hell-bent on flipping this seat. Without your help, he just might do it."**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: It's Time! Every Vote Counts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=9ba75ccb90&e=f9133ea432)
---
|
Hi , We are just three days away from one of the most important days in California’s history.

If you are fed up with the failed leadership that is destroying California, will you join my fight to get California back on track and vote for me as Governor?
---
| [FIND YOUR VOTING STATION HERE](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7d033b0a5d&e=f9133ea432 "FIND YOUR VOTING STATION HERE")
---
| I’ll fight to reverse policies that foolishly released thousands of criminals from prison and put them back in our neighborhoods.

Count on me to repeal laws that allow criminals to rob and steal without being held accountable. The state has spent billions on the homeless, but California’s problem is worse than ever.

Count on me to clean up the mess. Californians pay the highest rents and gas tax in the country. Electricity rates are among the highest in the nation.

The high cost of living in California places a massive burden on working people and retirees. It is nearly impossible for young people to buy a home.

I will fight to make California affordable for families. The state wasted billions on fraudulent unemployment benefits. Millions were scammed by criminals housed in state prisons while hard-working, honest people forced out of jobs by COVID-19 shutdowns had to wait months for help.

Isn’t it time to hold the administration accountable?

I’m a business owner and farmer who will crack down on crime, fix the homeless problem, and get taxes down. I’ll fight to return billions in surplus tax dollars to the taxpayers and not waste it on more mismanaged, failed programs.

Join my fight to fix California.
---
| [HERE IS WHERE TO VOTE ON TUESDAY](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=524feaad71&e=f9133ea432 "HERE IS WHERE TO VOTE ON TUESDAY")
---
| Together, we can see real change this year.

A vote for “Brian Dahle” for Governor is a vote for lasting change.

\- Senator Brian Dahle
---
| |
---

We know that you care about how the information you provide to us is used and shared. Millions were scammed by criminals housed in state prisons while hard-working, honest people forced out of jobs by COVID-19 shutdowns had to wait months for help. Isn’t it time to hold the administration accountable? I’m a business owner and farmer who will crack down on crime, fix the homeless problem, and get taxes down. I’ll fight to return billions in surplus tax dollars to the taxpayers and not waste it on more mismanaged, failed programs. Join my fight to fix California. | "HERE IS WHERE TO VOTE ON TUESDAY" | Together, we can see real change this year. A vote for “Brian Dahle” for Governor is a vote for lasting change. \- Senator Brian Dahle | | | At Brian Dahle For Governor, we are strongly committed to protecting your privacy and providing a safe online experience for all of our visitors while offering a high-quality user experience here at . name: Team Patty
subject: Oklahoma’s complete ban on abortion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The strictest abortion ban in the country.
#
Peter,
Oklahoma just signed into law the strictest abortion ban in the country. It is a complete ban. From the moment of fertilization, it becomes illegal for patients in Oklahoma to get an abortion. And it’s enforced the same way as the cruel Texas abortion ban – by allowing neighbors to sue those who get or help provide abortion care for cash prizes.
**[This is the kind of future Republicans have made clear they are building toward. We’ve got to stand together to stop them by keeping this seat and the Senate blue in November. Will you chip in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46148893/349044692/-1712589079?refcode=pm_em_220605_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA4ODU3OC1lNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QikDalOU5WIYT0eqBMan-txC582sZSqYcSLoLIOMXg=)**
Senate Republicans have already said that if they take back the majority they want to push through a federal abortion ban. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ entirely any day now. And in many cases, extreme politicians are already taking their attack on reproductive rights a step further–threatening access to birth control and even outlawing IVF.
**[Patty has and always will fight to protect reproductive rights. We need her in the Senate now more than ever. Will you contribute $5 right now to help make sure we send Patty back to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46148894/349044693/-1712589079?refcode=pm_em_220605_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA4ODU3OC1lNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QikDalOU5WIYT0eqBMan-txC582sZSqYcSLoLIOMXg=)**
The best way we can fight back against these cruel, dangerous attacks is by standing together and speaking out. We’re so grateful to have you in this fight with us.

Thanks,

Team Patty

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46148895/349044721/-1712589079?refcode=pm_em_220605_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA4ODU3OC1lNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QikDalOU5WIYT0eqBMan-txC582sZSqYcSLoLIOMXg=)****

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "From the
Desk of Roger Stone") Peter: I'm ready for Shifty Schiff to be gone yesterday! It's going to take way too long for the Durham investigation to finally convict Schiff of the treason he has committed. And like a hemorrhoid that just won't go away, Schiff just pulled another doozy! In the wake of the Supreme Court potentially overturning Roe V. Wade, Shifty Schiff makes no bones about his desire to pack the Supreme Court and eliminate the filibuster. You read that right, Shifty Schiff wants to destroy not one but two government institutions - the Supreme Court AND the Senate. **SCHIFF. HAS. GOT. TO. GO! Not later. Now!** That's why I'm proud to endorse my friend, Ronda Kennedy, who's running against Shifty Schiff. **[But my endorsement isn't enough on its own to beat Shifty Schiff. I need you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today to help Ronda defeat one of America's worst nightmares!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "But my endorsement isn’t enough on its own to beat Shifty
Schiff. I need you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today to help Ronda defeat one of America’s worst nightmares!")** We're hitting a once-in-a-generation election cycle that's putting even the "safest" Democrats on the chopping block. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "Ronda Kennedy Can Beat Shifty Schiff!")2022 has the protentional to make the 1994 Republican Revolution look like child's play. Ronda is EXACTLY who we need to defeat Schiff. She is a self-made success story - a working mother of 6 children, a committed wife, an attorney, the Dean of a law school, and the daughter of a Vietnam Vet. Even Schiff knows Ronda is the real deal... to the point he's gone on the attack against her. You don't attack your opponent if you're way ahead. I've worked in politics for five decades, so trust me when I say this...**Ronda Kennedy absolutely CAN defeat Adam Schiff in November.** **[But that"can" is dependent on America First conservatives like you. That's why it's imperative you step up and donate $50, $100, or $250 today to help Ronda kick Slithery Schiff to the curb.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "But that “can” is dependent on America First
conservatives like you. That’s why it’s imperative you step up and donate $50, $100, or $250 today to help Ronda kick Slithery Schiff to
the curb.")** What makes you the most upset about Shifty Schiff?
* That he pushed the Russia Hoax despite knowing all along they were... well, a hoax?
* That he led the sham impeachment of President Trump?
* That he got caught red-handed altering evidence during the Jan. 6 Hearings?

**Let me tell you my answer - none of them.** No, I'll be the most upset about Schiff that he wins re-election because Ronda didn't have enough conservatives donating to her campaign. Don't let that happen! I mean it when I say Ronda can win. **[But only if you step up today and donation $100, $500, or $1,000 right now to help fire one of the wickedest members in Congress this year.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "But only if you step up today
and donation $100, $500, or $1,000 right now to help fire one of the wickedest members in Congress this year")** I'm counting on you. Ronda is counting on you. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519090:6ZLzRtoiN:m:1:3317145305:77E74C5473F247267C4FF2C39F607A7F:r "Donate
today.")** Save America, Roger Stone

name: Anne Maher
subject: Will you support my husband?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
In case we haven’t met yet, I’m Anne Maher, Peter’s wife of 41 incredible years.
Since Peter first announced his campaign for Governor, I’ve had a wonderful time meeting many of his friends, supporters, and allies on the campaign trail. Speaking with Marylanders at farmers’ markets, holiday parades, on neighborhood main streets, and at small local businesses has been a true highlight of this past year, and I’d like to thank everyone who shared their stories with me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22]
Over my husband's decades of service to the people of Maryland, I’ve seen firsthand his incredible commitment to delivering results for our most vulnerable communities. He lives by a code to stand up for the underserved, and put those less fortunate before himself. He’ll make a brilliant Governor of Maryland, and he’ll partner with his statewide coalition of local activists, community leaders, and fellow elected officials to deliver bold, transformative change for our communities.
Peter is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination on July 19 -- but in order to get there, he needs your help. Right now, Peter and his team are working hard to meet their critical fundraising deadline on June 7. If you believe in Peter’s vision of transformative change and progress, will you chip in to help him meet his fundraising goal of $20,000?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605]
With mere weeks to go until election day, every dollar raised towards our goal will amplify our campaign’s efforts to reach out to voters in these final weeks. We need Peter as our next Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goal to make that happen!
My husband is humbled and honored by the trust that you place in him every day, and I know that he will never let you down as Maryland’s next Governor. If I haven’t met you on the campaign trail yet, I hope I have a chance to do so in the near future!
Onwards to victory,
Anne
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0605?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The 8 goals of the Global Elite
body:
Global Elites are gathered just days ago in a small town in Switzerland to plan to force their "Great Reset" agenda on the rest
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjehabnahf1k0ju5ss5r7qb0ckhdf47gmrdvempg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uspb2shhckqn4thim8rmcpjj63jj4s5jm9qe9oj0m1rbeo5h6kr3cc9gs5iratpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqr4pti6hj3coljc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c5gm2ob0spgm49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2a49csl0hu3eh0aao58pm622vdfm828s4b9ugcg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm2o76c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, Global Elites are gathered just days ago in a small town in Switzerland to plan to force their "Great Reset" agenda on the rest of the world. _It sounds like a B-list movie -- but it is horrifyingly real._ **The World Economic Forum (WEF) has declared war on Western values with their "Great Reset" agenda ... and they brought together Elites for their annual summit to discuss their radical scheme LAST WEEK.** Make no mistake, Fellow American: what the WEF is labeling as “Western values” are, in reality, Judeo-Christian values -- and the biblical values that MILLIONS of Americans cherish and live their lives by. [**I must urgently reach as many Americans of faith as possible with the TRUTH about the WEF's Great Reset ... which is why I'm giving away my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zah6mncjul8k7318aose6v0etq38atkv6ctus0g0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm2o76c5h2bs)
---
[**Get your book now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3dcuk8qkta39kg35tqghbv12atg9mcvqdlngj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm2o76c5h2bs)
---
It speaks volumes to me that many of the people rising up against the Great Reset are Americans of faith. You and I are able to see right through the WEF's sinister plans, because we have the light of Scripture, and because we know better than to blindly follow the princes of the world with all of their empty promises.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8mat4l3h18150t7fivts10innlk5qio8459ftjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm2o76c5h2bs)
---
_Whether you are familiar with the dangers of the Great Reset or are just learning of it today, you will gain critical information from my new book._ [**Specifically, in "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset," you will discover:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrv33mp207nh6ivt48fe8kfuqt3duai1r67vevg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5gm2o76c5h2bs) \--> a true understanding of the World Economic Forum and the shadowy figures behind it \--> what the "Great Reset" ACTUALLY is -- and how Elites are using the pandemic as their bridge to implement their radical agenda \--> the Christian response to the WEF’s “8 predictions” with my analysis of Scripture \--> and much, much more [**Because this knowledge is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of any amount, even just a dollar. name: John Fetterman
subject: the story behind my tattoos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46150769/349049176/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE2OWFmZC1lOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpjHhIDC-WP82XAsIfdjfIBU7uXRNqkETGM1cQNBTiQ=&emci=15a98859-f6e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=09a69afd-e8e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hey there, it’s John. We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself.
**On my left arm I have the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as Mayor, starting in 2006. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life. My heart breaks everytime I’m reminded of that.
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.
**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world.**
In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.
In my 13 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth + art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.
We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because I believe *every* community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock.**
It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own.
That promise is written on my arms. Literally. ❤️
In order to build the kind of Democratic U.S. Senate campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, however, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now. A big part of that is online activists like you chipping in when you can.
**And now that I am *officially* the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate, the team and I could *really* use everyone’s help right now.**
So, I gotta ask:
[**Will you please split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Admiral Mike Franken right now? Every dollar helps send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for your community just like I fight for mine. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46150770/349049183/1314858986?refcode=em20220605mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE2OWFmZC1lOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpjHhIDC-WP82XAsIfdjfIBU7uXRNqkETGM1cQNBTiQ=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be immediately split between John Fetterman and Admiral Mike Franken's campaigns:_

clean_body: Hey there, it’s John. We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are literally the first thing people Google about me. Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself. On my left arm I have the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill. On my right arm I have nine different dates. These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as Mayor, starting in 2006. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life. My heart breaks everytime I’m reminded of that. My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence. Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world. In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through. In my 13 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth + art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center. We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because I believe every community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock. It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own. That promise is written on my arms. Literally. ❤️ In order to build the kind of Democratic U.S. Senate campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, however, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now. A big part of that is online activists like you chipping in when you can. And now that I am officially the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate, the team and I could really use everyone’s help right now. So, I gotta ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be immediately split between John Fetterman and Admiral Mike Franken's campaigns: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all you do. Together, I know we can win this. Let’s gooooo. 🔥 John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Tara McMahon, NDRC
subject: Florida's courts are all over the place.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
now there are 2 choices before us
|
---

---
Folks – Florida's courts are all over the place. After multiple back-and-forths, Ron DeSantis’s extremely gerrymandered map – which _Salon_ called “an unconstitutional assault on Black voting power” – is back in effect for now. That means we have two choices about what to do next.

**CHOICE 1**
**We stay in the fight** in Florida and everywhere Republicans are trying to hang on to their manipulated maps across the country. **We hold politicians like Ron DeSantis accountable** for their gerrymandering and invest in replacing them with fair-redistricting Democrats in the 2022 elections. We stop the GOP from stacking the courts and state-level offices to ensure that redistricting is fair and _stays_ fair.

[_Will you help us choose this option and fight nationwide by rushing a donation right away? >>>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46150605/349049004/-687277776?amount=20&refcode=20220605.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhYzgxMjhhLWU4ZTQtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=obspshJTMccm1Sa5WA7D8RuVbehWFLmA17jAD4UOSDw=)

**CHOICE 2**
**We assume the fight is lost** in Florida and everywhere else. We give up and stop investing – allowing the GOP to hold on to their gerrymandered maps, reelect map manipulators, and put the pieces in place to ensure they can gerrymander with impunity over the next decade-plus. The combination of gerrymandering, voter suppression, and lies about election fraud allows Republicans to undermine our democracy _for good_.

[_Don’t let it happen in any state! Rush a donation to the NDRC >>>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46150612/349049006/-687277776?amount=20&refcode=20220605.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhYzgxMjhhLWU4ZTQtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=obspshJTMccm1Sa5WA7D8RuVbehWFLmA17jAD4UOSDw=)

The bottom line is that what happens next, in Florida and all over the country, **depends on you, folks**. The NDRC and our affiliates are fighting in the courts and in the states as hard as we can, but we urgently need you with us. **_Will you STAY IN THE FIGHT FOR FAIR MAPS NATIONWIDE?_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: now there are 2 choices before us | Folks – Florida's courts are all over the place. After multiple back-and-forths, Ron DeSantis’s extremely gerrymandered map – which Salon called “an unconstitutional assault on Black voting power” – is back in effect for now. That means we have two choices about what to do next. CHOICE 1 We stay in the fight in Florida and everywhere Republicans are trying to hang on to their manipulated maps across the country. We hold politicians like Ron DeSantis accountable for their gerrymandering and invest in replacing them with fair-redistricting Democrats in the 2022 elections. We stop the GOP from stacking the courts and state-level offices to ensure that redistricting is fair and stays fair. = CHOICE 2 We assume the fight is lost in Florida and everywhere else. We give up and stop investing – allowing the GOP to hold on to their gerrymandered maps, reelect map manipulators, and put the pieces in place to ensure they can gerrymander with impunity over the next decade-plus. The combination of gerrymandering, voter suppression, and lies about election fraud allows Republicans to undermine our democracy for good. = The bottom line is that what happens next, in Florida and all over the country, depends on you, folks. The NDRC and our affiliates are fighting in the courts and in the states as hard as we can, but we urgently need you with us. Will you STAY IN THE FIGHT FOR FAIR MAPS NATIONWIDE? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Tara = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Before the Primary Election
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46155354/349054710/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmJhZWRiYi1lY2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8EahcOM2fTHXkLKMPP-Pzy4XAYWdpnkjGc_yqL3DoIU=)
Hi Friend,

I know that many of you have already voted and the constant reminders may be getting annoying. Sorry! (Also, future apologies for the "remember to vote email" on June 7th.)

Here's the thing, while donations are always welcome in this broken system, the only thing that matters on election day is the number of votes. You could outspend your opponent 2:1 and still lose - it's happened before.

**So this Sunday, I want you to remind everyone you meet to vote - and try your hardest to convince them to vote for me.**

Thanks again for the support, let's finish the primary season strong, and keep fighting until the general election in November.

**Max Disclaimer:** _I am on Army Reserve training this weekend. This email was drafted before training started because - unlike many members of the Trump Administration - I respect the Hatch Act. So if something happens in the news after Thursday... well, I'm not mentioning it.

Instead, as you're reading this, I'm going to be a few (shower-less) days into training a bunch of 20-year-old soldiers on how to properly use the M240 medium machine gun in a Southern California desert. So if voting seems too "hard" or "inconvenient", trust me: it's nothing compared to the time and effort the military puts into protecting our right to vote._

name: John Fetterman
subject: On Friday night, Dr. Oz became my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I mean, just look at the sh*t he actually says.
#
Derek,
On Friday night, Dr. Oz officially became our GOP opponent in the race for Pennsylvania’s #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat.
^There are so many things wrong with that sentence. But Derek, maybe the most urgent reason we have to defeat Oz is **he’s a proud anti-choice extremist.**
**I mean, just look at the sh*t he actually says:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220605-1?refcode=em20220605-6103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6103_434096_RQycjN&akid=6103%2E434096%2ERQycjN)
With the Supreme Court poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ any day now, we cannot let someone with such dangerous views even get close to the U.S. Senate.
[**_Derek, help me beat Dr. Oz and I’ll go to Washington as the 51st Democratic vote to codify _Roe_ into law. Make a donation of any amount today so we can win this race, flip this seat, and protect the right to an abortion._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220605-1?refcode=em20220605-6103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6103_434096_RQycjN&akid=6103%2E434096%2ERQycjN)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220605-1?refcode=em20220605-6103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6103_434096_RQycjN&akid=6103%2E434096%2ERQycjN)**
I really do mean it when I say he’s an extremist, Derek.
**Dr. Oz called**** _Roe v. Wade_****“wrong” + supports an extreme ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest.**
If he buys his way into the U.S. Senate, he’d be a vote for a full-on national abortion ban.
My message to Dr. Oz and the Republicans is simple: Don’t f*ck with a woman’s right to choose. It’s a sacred right, and we won’t let these extreme attacks stand.
[**_But I need you with me. Help me defeat Dr. Oz and his $400,000,000 fortune by chipping in whatever you can, and I’ll fight with everything I have to codify _Roe_. _**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220605-1?refcode=em20220605-6103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6103_434096_RQycjN&akid=6103%2E434096%2ERQycjN)
We won’t let Dr. Oz spend his way into the U.S. Senate, and we won’t let Republicans strip women of the right to choose. We’ve got to do whatever it takes to win.
Thanks for being in this fight,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220605-6103-footer&t=1&refcode2=6103_434096_RQycjN&akid=6103%2E434096%2ERQycjN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Hey team, **In just two days, voters in New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district will determine which Democrat will go head-to-head with MAGA extremist Yvette Herrell in November.** This year’s midterm elections will determine what path New Mexico — and the country as a whole — will go down: more progress with a Democratic majority in Congress, or a GOP takeover that moves us all backward. **NM-02 is in a prime position to flip from red to blue, being named one of the top toss-up House seats in the nation. And Gabe is the strongest Democratic candidate in this race to make it happen.** Gabe’s people-powered campaign has been named a DCCC Red to Blue race and endorsed by dozens of trusted leaders at the federal, state, and local level, in addition to a multitude of unions, environmental organizations, and other community groups. The reality is, if we’re going to unseat far-right Herrell and stop her party’s extreme agenda against voting rights, reproductive choice, better-paying jobs, and more, _then we need to make Gabe the official Democratic nominee this Tuesday._ **[With less than 48 hours left until voters make their voices heard in the primary, please rush $10 or whatever you can to continue fueling our movement to elect Gabe, a trusted public servant and true representative of NM-02, to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156107/349056243/316559552?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220605herrell_vfc_od_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg1YjFmNi1lZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U438ZSwi7KtPVrONrpmcef8Q9j6B_FR84skJyZOoL0Y=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey team, In just two days, voters in New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district will determine which Democrat will go head-to-head with MAGA extremist Yvette Herrell in November. This year’s midterm elections will determine what path New Mexico — and the country as a whole — will go down: more progress with a Democratic majority in Congress, or a GOP takeover that moves us all backward. NM-02 is in a prime position to flip from red to blue, being named one of the top toss-up House seats in the nation. And Gabe is the strongest Democratic candidate in this race to make it happen. Gabe’s people-powered campaign has been named a DCCC Red to Blue race and endorsed by dozens of trusted leaders at the federal, state, and local level, in addition to a multitude of unions, environmental organizations, and other community groups. The reality is, if we’re going to unseat far-right Herrell and stop her party’s extreme agenda against voting rights, reproductive choice, better-paying jobs, and more, then we need to make Gabe the official Democratic nominee this Tuesday. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for anything you can do to help us win the primary this Tuesday! — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter, there is no acceptable reason why military-style assault weapons should still be allowed on our streets.

In 2012, a legally purchased AR-15 was used to end the lives of 20 children and six staff members in Sandy Hook Elementary School. In 2016, a similar legally purchased rifle was used to take 49 lives at Pulse nightclub. Three weeks ago, a legally purchased AR-15-style weapon was used to kill 10 New Yorkers in a Buffalo supermarket. _And one week after that, a legally purchased assault weapon was used to murder 19 children and 2 teachers in an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. _And now, only days ago, an AR-15 was used to kill 4 people in a hospital in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
**The facts are painfully clear: Legally purchased military-style assault weapons are the weapon of choice for most mass shooters and make shootings _significantly_ more deadly.** We MUST ban these weapons before they’re used in yet another tragedy.
I’ve spent my years as your attorney general fighting to protect New Yorkers from gun violence in any way I can – including holding gun manufacturers and sellers accountable for their part in this epidemic – but I need to know if you’re in this fight with me. **Peter, I need to hear from 10,000 fearless fighters before midnight, so please take a moment to answer this quick one-question survey:**
| | **Should we ban military-style assault weapons?**
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Anyone who has had the privilege of working with John knows that he has an incredible capacity for empathy and a wide breadth of lived experiences powering his work to close opportunity gaps.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156346/349057610/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220605&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=AD_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d54390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zT8IA9Hra8uNxNR8FHDcvTLzZ4Ve11W2NLMqBTuBbnI=) | Peter, John and I go way back. Not only did he succeed me as President Obama’s Secretary of Education, but we partnered together for years to implement institutional changes for good, like the Second Chance Pell Grant program and the Every Student Succeeds Act. Now, he’s running for governor to serve Maryland with the same integrity and commitment he brought every single day to the Department of Education – and [_**I’m reaching out today to humbly ask if you’ll pitch in a contribution to fuel him there.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156347/349057611/151645868?source=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220605&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=AD_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d54390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zT8IA9Hra8uNxNR8FHDcvTLzZ4Ve11W2NLMqBTuBbnI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156348/349057612/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220605&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=AD_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d54390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zT8IA9Hra8uNxNR8FHDcvTLzZ4Ve11W2NLMqBTuBbnI=) Anyone who has had the privilege of working with John knows that he has an incredible capacity for empathy and a wide breadth of lived experiences powering his work to close opportunity gaps. When he first told me he was running for Maryland governor, there was never a doubt in my mind that he’s the person for the job. Education is a top-priority issue for so many families, and John’s message of equal opportunity and ensuring educators have a seat at the table is resonating strongly. Don’t take it just from me though, look at his recent surge in the polls! **John is polling just 1-point behind frontrunner Peter Franchot, reflecting a massive surge in momentum.** Now John’s team is riding that momentum, but they need your help. From mobilizing volunteers, to running ads on television and online, and reaching undecided voters in every corner of the state, John’s campaign simply cannot pull this off without you. [_**If you are able, please contribute whatever you can today to help support John’s campaign before their big fundraising deadline on June 7th.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156349/349057613/151645868?source=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220605&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=AD_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d54390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zT8IA9Hra8uNxNR8FHDcvTLzZ4Ve11W2NLMqBTuBbnI=) If everyone reading this pitches in $10, $5, or even $3 to make John’s vision a reality, our students, educators, economy, and environment will all reap the benefits. **Let’s elect a teacher as Maryland’s next governor.** | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156350/349057614/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220605-fr_full-AD_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220605&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=AD_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d54390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zT8IA9Hra8uNxNR8FHDcvTLzZ4Ve11W2NLMqBTuBbnI=)

clean_body: Anyone who has had the privilege of working with John knows that he has an incredible capacity for empathy and a wide breadth of lived experiences powering his work to close opportunity gaps. = | Peter, John and I go way back. Not only did he succeed me as President Obama’s Secretary of Education, but we partnered together for years to implement institutional changes for good, like the Second Chance Pell Grant program and the Every Student Succeeds Act. Now, he’s running for governor to serve Maryland with the same integrity and commitment he brought every single day to the Department of Education – and = = Anyone who has had the privilege of working with John knows that he has an incredible capacity for empathy and a wide breadth of lived experiences powering his work to close opportunity gaps. When he first told me he was running for Maryland governor, there was never a doubt in my mind that he’s the person for the job. Education is a top-priority issue for so many families, and John’s message of equal opportunity and ensuring educators have a seat at the table is resonating strongly. Don’t take it just from me though, look at his recent surge in the polls! John is polling just 1-point behind frontrunner Peter Franchot, reflecting a massive surge in momentum. Now John’s team is riding that momentum, but they need your help. From mobilizing volunteers, to running ads on television and online, and reaching undecided voters in every corner of the state, John’s campaign simply cannot pull this off without you. = If everyone reading this pitches in $10, $5, or even $3 to make John’s vision a reality, our students, educators, economy, and environment will all reap the benefits. Let’s elect a teacher as Maryland’s next governor. | | = Thank you, Arne Duncan 9th United States Secretary of Education * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Every year, tens of thousands of Americans lose their lives to gun violence. From schools to grocery stores to concerts and places of worship, it seems as though no place is safe from the threat of gun violence.

**We can and we must do better.**

As Rhode Island Treasurer, I've been working to restrict sales and purchases of firearm kits, components, and accessories used to assemble undetectable "ghost guns." And I've divested the state’s pension fund from companies that manufacture assault weapons for non-military use.

In Congress, I will continue fighting to end gun violence with the same common-sense approach that I've taken as Treasurer. I'll work to make sure the Bipartisan Background Checks Act is signed into law and support common-sense legislation like a ban on assault weapons and red flag laws. That's why I was named a Gun Sense Candidate by Moms Demand Action.

But now, I want to know if you're with me:

**[If you agree it's past time we took action to end the gun violence epidemic, add your name to join me in calling for common-sense gun safety legislation >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46156384/349057706/-720115778?ms=em22_220605_gun2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220605_gun2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220605_gun2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220605_gun2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=GVwx7ZV%2FNlpPv8p5xPXWOvtA7GNIbq%2BguTjXupGSxHcxd0EGScYZkg69GxJulwH4J9yYUWAv%2BIdVOaSSZl%2BJ%2FE%2BUzfRc38oxEXQSl2Xy%2F1QB5ZddZBFNBZxABd%2BCXG5ACNVmDfHJZSheoBsO1d2HfLUZUDX3YrLjRyrcbqekL3g%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQzOTBlYy1mMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iO96szb1byd9Loy4axgmQJQBcpuoXmFeaJ3jIlXc6Ww=&emci=c9bbe279-66e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=cc4390ec-f0e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you in advance for your first $3 donation.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign. When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much they gave.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
Now that we’re in an election year and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever.
But here’s the thing, the NRSC is spending MILLIONS on attack ads against me and we don’t even have a Republican opponent yet. If this is what they’re doing now, imagine what they’ll be doing once we do.
And I have to be honest with you: May was a strong month for us, but it didn’t make up for how slow April was. We can’t afford to have a slow June, too.
**So, I want to do something special today. I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY. So, chip in today and you could be hearing from me soon:**
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to my re-election campaign? Help us reach our fundraising goals and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups that want to beat us. And if you donate today, you might be one of the people I reach out to.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220605-1-subs&t=1&akid=2983%2E6688874%2E-xNprG)

clean_body: Friends — I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign. When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much they gave. I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election. Now that we’re in an election year and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever. But here’s the thing, the NRSC is spending MILLIONS on attack ads against me and we don’t even have a Republican opponent yet. If this is what they’re doing now, imagine what they’ll be doing once we do. And I have to be honest with you: May was a strong month for us, but it didn’t make up for how slow April was. We can’t afford to have a slow June, too. So, I want to do something special today. I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY. So, chip in today and you could be hearing from me soon: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for chipping in today. It means a lot. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I hate losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I didn't know how to tell you this.

|

---

Peter,

I'm losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi's handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is
