body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4046%2E3611125%2EFn6hF6 ][IMG]

Hey there,

Economy and jobs are at the top of Ohio voters’ minds in recent polls. But
I'd like to hear from you, what's on your mind?

While JD Vance is trying to win over Donald Trump, my number one priority
is making sure this campaign represents YOU.

I wish I could grab a cup of coffee with every one of you to hear about
your concerns, but I’ll have to settle for the next best thing.

My team put together a short priorities survey (seriously, two minutes
tops!). [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220605_EN_CoffeeJobs_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=4046%2E3611125%2EFn6hF6 ]Will you take a moment to let me know what issues matter the
most to you in this race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220605_EN_CoffeeJobs_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=1008&akid=4046%2E3611125%2EFn6hF6 ]Take the Survey

The only way we’ll finally cut workers in on the deal is by expanding our
Democratic Senate majority. We need to build a winning operation with
folks all over Ohio (that means you!) to flip this seat blue.

Your voice matters to me, so I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to fill out
my survey today.

Thanks,

Tim

name: Emily Mellits
subject: A message from me to start the month
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend!

I know, I’m popping in a bit early this month but I have an important message and I figure it’s better to get it to you ear
lier, rather than later. (Full disclosure, I had to bump an email from Dan, but don’t worry you’ll hear from him early next week.)

I’m writing because June is a crucial time for Jocelyn’s campaign. We’re planning our summer budget and we need to know exactly how much money we can spend to let people know that it doesn’t matter if you are a Democrat, a Republican or an Independent - Jocelyn will make sure our elections are safe and secure and that your vote counts. After all, safe and secure elections are the basis of our democracy.
If all goes well, (and so far it's going really well) we’ll have the campaign resources to make sure Jocelyn’s re-election campaign has everything it needs to finish strong on Election Day. That means this month, we’re increasing our goal and working hard to make sure we hit it.

This month we need to raise $30,000 from our grassroots supporters to ensure Jocelyn has the resources she needs to get re-elected in November.

Donate today and help us meet this goal, friend.

Donate >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=060422

]I’ll be checking-in periodically this month to let you know where we stand. I appreciate all you’re doing for our campaign and the fight to protect our democracy.

-Emily Mellits
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael?=
subject: Election Day Final Push
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends, Election Day is only *two* days away! Thank you for all the support and volunteer work that so many of you have helped out with. As we've done events throughout the district and spoken with thousands of constituents, it is clear that people want a change from our current representation and are eager to support our America First message. I have no doubt that if everyone in the district knows about our campaign, we win in a landslide.
While we've spent hundreds of thousands on TV, radio, digital, and newspaper ads, we know there are still some that haven't heard about the campaign. It's why I and several others have been knocking on doors around the district for weeks to reach this last segment of people, and will continue this afternoon and on Monday.
If you are interested in knocking on doors Sunday/Monday or waving a sign and distributing literature at a polling location on Tuesday, please let me or my campaign manager Nathan (nathan@votecassidy.com) know so we can get you literature and assign you a polling station.
Thank you again, and I hope you have a blessed Pentecost Sunday. Sincerely, Michael

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, Election Day is only two days away! Thank you for all the support and volunteer work that so many of you have helped out with. As we've done events throughout the district and spoken with thousands of constituents, it is clear that people want a change from our current representation and are eager to support our America First message. I have no doubt that if everyone in the district knows about our campaign, we win in a landslide. While we've spent hundreds of thousands on TV, radio, digital, and newspaper ads, we know there are still some that haven't heard about the campaign. It's why I and several others have been knocking on doors around the district for weeks to reach this last segment of people, and will continue this afternoon and on Monday. If you are interested in knocking on doors Sunday/Monday or waving a sign and distributing literature at a polling location on Tuesday, please let me or my campaign manager Nathan (nathan@votecassidy.com) know so we can get you literature and assign you a polling station. Thank you again, and I hope you have a blessed Pentecost Sunday. Sincerely, Michael Flyer: Front: Back: | | | | | | | | | | | | | You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. — Greg Landsman

clean_body: I’VE SENT YOU 5 MESSAGES [] Fellow Patriot, I’ve warned you for months that Kean is anti-parent, bad for our economy, spineless, pro-regulation, and receives the worst ratings every year from conservative watchdog groups. Don’t let him fool you. And I’ve sent you several messages so you can show your support for Phil Rizzo. Don’t betray us in the home stretch, show us that you stand with the only true conservative fighter in this race. STAND WITH PHIL RIZZO [] I won’t be emailing you again, this is your last chance to prove that you are part of our movement to take back New Jersey. LAST CHANCE — DONATE [] We will declare victory on June 7th. Yours in Victory, [] Phil Rizzo DONATE [] PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS. Friends of Liz Cheney,

As our state and nation continue to face unprecedented challenges, there are some important points we must remember to _**keep Wyoming and America strong.**_

_And this starts with the men and women we elect._

There are people who don’t do their homework, who are more focused on being celebrities than solving problems, and who treat politics like it’s a game. It’s not a game. People’s lives are affected by the decisions our elected leaders make. Our country’s future is determined by how elected officials choose to lead. **We must incentivize seriousness or else we will stay trapped in an endless cycle of vitriol and toxicity that is hurtling us towards a dark, destructive, and dangerous place.**

Liz Cheney is a serious leader. She’s serious about doing what is best for Wyoming and focused on putting our country over partisan, political interests.

And she needs your support today. name: VetVoice Foundation
subject: Our GUN SAFETY ad in the NYT today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
body:
In the military, we are trained thoroughly to handle and store weapons SAFELY.
#
Derek -
Changing our gun laws is not about ”control.” It’s about SAFETY.
It’s about keeping our communities SAFE. It’s about keeping our kids SAFE.
In the military, we are trained thoroughly to handle and store weapons SAFELY. Before we even fire at a range we are taught to handle, use and store our weapons SAFELY.
These measures have nothing to do with control — they are in place to save lives.
We are running a full page ad in the New York Times to make that point. Because “gun control” is an NRA talking point and editors and reporters need to realize that. We’ve included an image of the ad below.
[**But before you go, please use this link to make a contribution to Vet Voice Foundation to help us continue to spread this critical message.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vvf_gunsafety.JKRH5e&refcode=em220605-1-15&t=1&akid=5898%2E3013755%2EFolcDy)

I won’t sugarcoat this: I’m mad as hell because I’m watching Republicans destroy democracy in real time.

**First, Donald Trump’s MAGA enablers amplified the Big Lie that the election was rigged.**

When conspiracy theories about our election’s legitimacy led to _a coup attempt on our Capitol_ , Republicans blocked a bipartisan investigation around Jan. 6.

**Then, far-right Republicans blocked the _For The People Act_** , a much-needed and wildly popular election reform bill. _They wouldn’t even allow debate in the Senate!_

**Now, Republicans are proposing — _and passing_ — hundreds of state-side voter suppression laws nationwide.** Worse, their efforts are targeting our country’s most marginalized and already‐disadvantaged communities.

I won’t mince words: We need to make sure far‐right cronies like my former opponent Devin Nunes cannot lie, cheat, and steal away our democracy.

To do it, we must expand our House majority and oust every single anti-Democratic Republican in office. **I'm running in an OPEN SEAT race and we can't let our this seat fall to MAGA traitors.**

body:
Ronny Jackson will soon face the House Ethics Committee for this | |

| Yes, you read that correctly.

Ronny Jackson has allegedly been using _thousands_ of dollars in campaign donations to pay for his personal membership to a private social club. Lavish wine tastings, rounds of golf, they’re all included in his luxurious membership - and he’s misusing campaign funds to foot the bill.

We need to do everything in our power to keep corrupt politicians like Ronny out of office.

[Donate to my campaign today to elect a representative who knows the difference between right and wrong, and who will put your interests first. ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=35bc8f2202&e=4712f71bea)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I want to make the most of these final 48 hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Between my duties in Congress on the intelligence committee and the January 6 committee, and doing everything I can to get out the vote in the final 48 hours of this California jungle primary election, I am burning the candle on both ends.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=306%2E5257348%2Ehxgy2j)
I've got about 15 minutes of free time this morning, Derek.
Between my duties in Congress on the intelligence committee and the January 6 committee, and doing everything I can to get out the vote in the final 48 hours of this California jungle primary election, I am burning the candle on both ends.
We're up against a QAnon conspiracy theorist in this race who is supported by Roger Stone and Michael Flynn. We're up against Kevin McCarthy, Donald Trump, and other top Republicans who are trying to smear my name. And we're up against the talking heads at Fox News like Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity who paint me as a villain to their nightly audience of millions of MAGA viewers.
**Winning this primary with a sizable majority would send a strong message that I'm not going anywhere — and that millions of people are willing to fight back against right-wing misinformation and defend our democracy.**
We need to make these final days count. **[Can you pitch in a few bucks to help us finish strong? I’d be humbled to have your support before I get back out there.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=306%2E5257348%2Ehxgy2j)**

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Asking for $20
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
an onslaught of attack ads funded by Mitch McConnell and National Republicans.
#

In just a second, we’re going to ask you to make a $20 donation to Cheri’s campaign. Here’s why:
Now that the primary is over and Cheri is officially the Democratic nominee, we are facing an onslaught of misleading attack ads funded by Mitch McConnell and National Republicans.
They’ve seen the polling, and they know that this race is incredibly close. That’s why two of the biggest right-wing Super PACs have already booked more than $33 million worth of TV ads in North Carolina, the second-most of any Senate race in the country.
Now, we know that $20 might not seem like much compared to the obscene sums of money Mitch McConnell and National Republicans are pumping into this race, but when everyone is pitching in, it adds up fast.
[**So please make a donation today — of $20 or whatever you can afford to give — to elect Cheri Beasley and expand Democrats’ Senate majority. We would not ask if it was not so important.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220605-1-ma&refcode2=1003.357359.Fy3KWy&t=1&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy)
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220605-1-ma&refcode2=1003.357359.Fy3KWy&t=2&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy)**
We’ve received tens of thousands of donations from teachers, small business owners, students, postal workers, and people from all across the country, all giving what they can afford because they believe in Cheri and our campaign.
That’s a testament to what we’re building here in North Carolina, and together, we are proving every day that this campaign has what it takes to swing North Carolina blue and expand our Senate Majority.
[**If you’re with us and ready for a Senator who will actually fight for our families and for progress in Washington, make a $20 donation to elect Cheri Beasley today.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220605-1-ma&refcode2=1003.357359.Fy3KWy&t=3&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy)
Thank you for everything you do to make this campaign possible. When we win this race in November, know that it was because people like you got involved.
\- Team Beasley
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220605-1-ma&refcode2=1003.357359.Fy3KWy&t=4&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1003_357359_Fy3KWy&akid=1003%2E357359%2EFy3KWy) today to help us make history.

name: Val Demings
subject: overcoming the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I am depending on you to maintain my momentum and win
| | |
---
We’re building a grassroots army capable of defeating Rubio, friend. **And I'm counting on donations from supporters like you to hit each of my fundraising goals.**
The Cook Political Report _increased _my chances of winning. We're gaining ground, and the GOP is taking notice. That's why they're parachuting in to destroy that momentum: National Republicans already committed $10 million to keeping Florida red permanently. Missing my midnight goal makes it even harder to compete with that kind of investment.

**I am not giving up – b****ut Rubio has the advantage, and I am depending on _you _to maintain my momentum and win. You know the hill I have to climb – and you know what a win in Florida could mean for our country, so I've got to ask: [Will you please make a contribution of $5 or more to win in Florida, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46158769/349068349/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3378-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2FkMDY4Mi1mZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Axn3o7xC8TRrNi2qAw0zV_FwDUfCWDPfgWYnDDiWvjI=)**

| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)

Fellow American, Global Elites are gathered just days ago in a small town in Switzerland to plan to force their "Great Reset" agenda on the rest of the world. _It sounds like a B-list movie -- but it is horrifyingly real._ **The World Economic Forum (WEF) has declared war on Western values with their "Great Reset" agenda ... and they brought together Elites for their annual summit to discuss their radical scheme LAST WEEK.** Make no mistake, Fellow American: what the WEF is labeling as “Western values” are, in reality, Judeo-Christian values -- and the biblical values that MILLIONS of Americans cherish and live their lives by. [**I must urgently reach as many Americans of faith as possible with the TRUTH about the WEF's Great Reset ... which is why I'm giving away my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)
---
[**Get your book now**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)
---
It speaks volumes to me that many of the people rising up against the Great Reset are Americans of faith. You and I are able to see right through the WEF's sinister plans, because we have the light of Scripture, and because we know better than to blindly follow the princes of the world with all of their empty promises.
---
[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)
---
_Whether you are familiar with the dangers of the Great Reset or are just learning of it today, you will gain critical information from my new book._ [**Specifically, in "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset," you will discover:**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk) \--> a true understanding of the World Economic Forum and the shadowy figures behind it \--> what the "Great Reset" ACTUALLY is -- and how Elites are using the pandemic as their bridge to implement their radical agenda \--> the Christian response to the WEF’s “8 predictions” with my analysis of Scripture \--> and much, much more [**Because this knowledge is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book -- "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset" -- for a gift of any amount, even just a dollar. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)
---
[**Get your book now**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against the Leftist Elites who hate our belief in God, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life and my work to inspiring young people to love America again through Turning Point USA _and_ to activating millions of Americans of faith to restore America through Turning Point USA Faith. Now I've written my new book, "The Conservative Response to the Great Reset," to help patriots like YOU, Fellow American, stand up to the dangerous Great Reset agenda -- and I want to send it to you today for a gift of any amount, even just a dollar. [**Please claim YOUR copy of this critically important new book right now.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFj71qxDAQhJ_G7mSktX58hYtAuO5ShEBKsVqt70R8tpFk8vpR8gKBqb5i5ps4R4qoqE8zSABppVFaTyCHANLhRQZjJmA2S6clrpzrkPk4w5oIt4rla9kz8UD7s3_MdkG1yFGBcQxGkyQNMcRowRLqqPvPm79hWtN2f8Mnz7kuPheP7OtxFhSZC1dvhREAXvXr_Kj1KN340sG1pTCdmQfcOO71d7Kxeuat1YljT1sVraQxF4glGxYOAwitrRLBOCNUCPoykaV4Md14LfvZ1D3tkbvx9f3jCtM4uj7P8fhO65qKde3z_dmE__7Vf3x_AJQPagk)

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

subject: Pissed off

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46159371/349071308/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzI4NWRmYS0wMWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0V_VPD6BVrRf-sjeHRJqa9BnVwrIe4LfFKHYOZl3lOQ=)

| | Frankly, folks, I’m pissed off – the living conditions at Naval shipyards are abhorrent and need immediate attention. I could say a lot more words you might expect from a sailor – but I’ll keep it simple, our service members deserve so much better. **We should be making investments in shipyards to provide our sailors with a quality of life and a healthy work environment during maintenance and refueling operations. But instead, our sailors are faced with lack of electricity and hot water, construction noises that make it impossible for them to rest, and no mental health resources. ** We have an obligation to our sailors to ensure that they are being supported while serving our country! As Vice Chair of the Armed Services Committee, a member of the Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, and a 20-year Navy Veteran myself, I’m one of the top voices in Congress for more investment in the health and well-being of our Armed Forces. But I’m also one of the GOP’s top targets heading into November – and if Republicans succeed in flipping my seat, I won’t be able to fight for this issue in Congress. name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: It's all on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We cannot afford to lose Alex’s voice in the fight to protect our planet and our democracy
#

Hey team,
Going into this Tuesday’s primary, there are _so many_ important issues on the ballot.
Whether it’s securing life-saving gun legislation, battling climate change, trying to advance voting rights legislation, or finally fixing our broken immigration system, it’s all on the line this election.
**We cannot afford to lose Alex’s voice in the fight for these critical issues, so please:**
[**Make a donation to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate. There are just a few days left until the primary election, so please chip in today if you can afford to do so.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220605-1-30&t=1&akid=838%2E159979%2Ewjzt9A)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220605-1-30&t=2&akid=838%2E159979%2Ewjzt9A)**
In his first year in the Senate, Alex fought to secure billions of dollars in COVID-19 relief for California families and small businesses, pushed for bold climate action to improve access to clean air and water, introduced sweeping legislation to increase affordable housing and protect families from wildfires, and has led the fight for voting rights and immigration reform.
But after Tuesday’s primary, the very same anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace Governor Newsom are going to be coming for Alex even harder.
They’d love to replace California’s first Latino senator with a right-wing Republican who would vote in lockstep with Mitch McConnell. And they’ll do and spend whatever it takes to make that happen.
But as long as we continue to stand together and all do our part, we are going to win this race and hold this seat. **So with just days to go until the primary on Tuesday, we are asking:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? We can’t afford to lose Alex’s voice in the Senate, and your contribution will help ensure we have the resources to fight back against whatever Republicans are going to throw our way.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220605-1-30&t=3&akid=838%2E159979%2Ewjzt9A)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220605-1-30&t=4&akid=838%2E159979%2Ewjzt9A)**
Thank you!
Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=838%2E159979%2Ewjzt9A)

name: Tim Michels
subject: ✅ Endorsed by President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michels for Governor, Inc
body:
I’m Tim Michels, an Army veteran, a builder, and I was just endorsed by President Donald J. Trump to be the next Governor of W
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9o45onjdmtih5r9e6re6pr01vkbcs5bp6agsha8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upjrap74c9j36cdnm9rjco36m9h6eppnm2pm8db1chjr7d1hcppmap9kc4p6as77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shkcoqm9ddk6up72phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c5gmapb3chjm49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkb33jsqu2mmr89khaeoucfp42an5opt9fsmb540_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5imaor4cth2bs)
---
Hi there friend, I’m Tim Michels, an Army veteran, a builder, and**I was just endorsed by President Donald J. Trump to be the next Governor of Wisconsin. ** **Have a look for yourself.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zop87do0ljtdeisrbddfcj27nqu1pgupdqfg7l9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5imaor4cth2bs)
---
Tim Michels is a very successful businessman running for Governor of the Great State of Wisconsin.

During my Administration, Tim served on my infrastructure task force, and helped us plan and start building the Keystone XL Pipeline before Joe Biden launched his assault on American Energy production.

The current Governor, Tony Evers, has been an abject failure for the people of Wisconsin, from his abysmal handling of the China Virus, where his lockdowns were unprecedented, to rampant crime across the State.

Wisconsin needs a Governor who will Stop Inflation, Uphold the Rule of Law, strengthen our Borders (we had the strongest borders in history just two years ago, now we have the weakest!) and End the well-documented Fraud in our Elections. Tim Michels is the best candidate to deliver meaningful solutions to these problems, and he will produce jobs like no one else can even imagine. Tim is an America First Conservative who Supports our Second Amendment, Honors our Brave Law Enforcement and First Responders, and Stands Strongly against the Woke Mob trying to destroy our Country.

Tim Michels has my Complete and Total Endorsement. If Wisconsin has the wisdom to make Tim their next governor, it will have unprecedented success! **- _President Donald J. Trump_**
---
| | [**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ENDORSEMENT - CHIP IN NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6asl22sdjeku8usle36qisbm66ksorfibjijaj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5imaor4cth2bs)
---
As a fellow builder and political outsider - I’m proud to have his endorsement. We're guys who build things, not politicians. And together, we were supposed to build the Keystone XL Pipeline, provide great American jobs, and put American energy independence first. **We sure could use that right now** _-_ but Joe Biden canceled it on Day 1, and Tony Evers was silent. **As Governor, I’ll rebuild our state, make our communities safe again, and get Wisconsin back to work** \- [**will you join President Trump in endorsing my fight with a $5 contribution right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ncofhpq2jbm78299p7lm9hd676945asdnscd20_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c5imaor4cth2bs)
---

But despite how close this race is, JD and I couldn’t be any more different. JD is backed by Silicon Valley billionaires and the Trump fundraising machine, so you know who he’ll be loyal to if he buys his way into the Senate. Me? I’ve spent my career putting Ohio first and fighting to improve the lives of working families. Entries must be received between May 12, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on June 30, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) MAGA Hat that was signed by President Donald J.Trump and round-trip transportation and Rally accommodations for two (2) (approximate retail value $3040). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Russell=20Fry?=
subject: End of Legislative Session Update
body:
Check out what the Legislature Worked on this Year, including updates on tax cuts and election integrity | | | |
---
| | |
_**End of Session Update**_
The 2021-2022 Legislative Session came to a close on Thursday, May 12. This close yielded RESULTS for our Republican Caucus Agenda, which aims to slash government red-tape, cut taxes, and make a more efficient government that works for the people -- one that makes South Carolina a better place to work, go to school, own a business and raise a family.

This newsletter highlights some of the important legislation passed, and what will be headed to a conference committee to work out differences between the House and the Senate.

**The Budget and Tax Cuts:**
The House’s [budget](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=2d4ee02241&e=44ebe864a7) centered around 4 R’s: increasing **reserves** , improving our **roads** and infrastructure, securing **raises **for teachers and first responders, and over $1 billion in tax **relief**. Conferees will meet to address differences between the House and Senate’s budgets. A conference committee will also meet to address differences with S. 1087, the “Comprehensive Tax Cut Act of 2022”. Legislators will return on the 15th to pass a finalized version of the budget.

**Increasing Reserves:**
Raising our state general reserve fund was a priority for the House this year, which helps prepare South Carolina in the face of financial uncertainty. A bill that will gradually raise reserves from 5% to 7% and increase capital reserve funds from 2% to 3% was passed in the House this year, but will go to a conference committee to address its differences with the Senate.

**No Room for Voter Fraud in South Carolina: **
Safeguarding our elections has been the #1 priority of many lawmakers after questions were raised about the integrity of votes in 2020. It is of utmost importance that each vote cast in an election is COUNTED, and counted only once. The South Carolina House was proud to usher through legislation to ensure that will always be the case. Signed by the Governor on May 13th 2022, this bill fortifies South Carolina’s election system. This law makes it easier to vote and harder to cheat.

Here are a few of the protections in the legislation, many of which affect this year’s Statewide Primary on June 14th:
● Establishes early voting in South Carolina for the two weeks preceding any election
● A county’s size determines the number of early voting locations
● Standardizes and strengthens the absentee vote-by-mail system and requires a verifiable witness signature
● Limits candidates to only one party nomination and listing on any ballot
● Requires affidavits and the last four digits of their social security number to early vote or to vote absentee
● Enhances penalties for violating election laws

**WE THE PEOPLE - Convention of States:**
A conference committee has been appointed to work out differences in the House and Senate versions of S. 133, which calls for the US Congress to hold a Convention of the States. A Convention of States’ purpose is to propose new amendments pursuant to Article V of the United States Constitution. It would require balanced federal budgets each year, holding the Federal Government to the same standard as State Government. You and I have to balance our checkbooks and live within our means - why shouldn’t the Federal Government have to? South Carolina would be state number 28 of the 34 needed to call for a federal balanced budget amendment.

**Real School Choice for South Carolina: **
Giving families in South Carolina real school choice and educational freedom is long overdue. A conference committee was formed to address differences between the Senate and the House’s school choice bill. The House bill establishes a three-year “Parental Choice in Education Program”, where five thousand public school students who are financially disadvantaged or part of an active duty military family can qualify for a scholarship of up to $5,000 to attend the school of their choice.

**Cutting Property Taxes:**
In the South Carolina House, we are dedicated to reducing the heavy tax burden on South Carolinian families. The House made appointments to a conference committee to address its differences with the Senate on S. 233, a bill allowing a real property tax exemption extension. Among other things, the legislation proposes that when a spouse passes away, the surviving spouse could receive a property tax exemption if the surviving spouse owns the house and meets certain qualifications. The legislation also helps support one of our state’s largest industries: the agriculture industry, by establishing a property tax exemption for all farm buildings and agricultural structures owned by a producer in this state.

**“Workforce Enhancement and Military Recognition Act”:**
This legislative session has been dedicated to supporting and bettering the lives of our veterans. One bill which allows all military retirement income to be deducted from an individual’s South Carolina income taxes, has been signed into law. I was proud to support this bill to eliminate the heavy burden of taxes for our veterans.

**Veterans Burial Honor Guard Support Fund:**
A conference committee was appointed for S. 968, a bill to establish the “Veterans Service Organization Burial Honor Guard Support Fund.” The fund offsets the costs to provide honor guard burial details at funerals of qualifying South Carolina veterans.

**Patriotism in South Carolina Schools:**
S. 969 was signed into law by the Governor. This allows the state Board of Education to require the display of patriotic emblems (such as flags or mottos) of the United States of America and the State of South Carolina in our schools. I look forward to bringing American patriotism back to our classrooms!

**Minimum Age for Corrections Officers:**
S. 1092 was ratified [R. 243], which goes to address the shortage of correctional officers in South Carolina. This ensures that detention and correctional officer candidates in South Carolina are at least eighteen years old, rather than the former minimum age of twenty-one years old.

**Volunteer Firefighter Grants:**
Keeping our firefighters prepped and ready with the resources and gear they need is crucial to upholding public safely. The Governor signed into law legislation which simplifies the authority of the State Fire Marshal and enhances the Volunteer Strategic Assistance and Fire Equipment (V-SAFE) Program - a program that awards grants to volunteer fire departments.

**‘Save Women’s Sports Act** ’:
The Governor signed the ‘Save Women’s Sports Act’, a bill which originated in the House. This bill aims to maintain the competitive advantage for female athletes in sports. The new law is fairly straightforward: it requires, by proof of a birth certificate, that those who were designated ‘male’ at birth **solely** participate in men’s sports, rather than participate in sports designated for females.

**Unencumbered Time for Teachers:**
S. 946 was signed by the Governor, which is a bill establishing at least thirty minutes of unencumbered time on each regular school day for full-time teachers between kindergarten and fifth grade. Additionally, there must be at least thirty minutes of unencumbered time on each regular school day for any K-12 teacher who instructs a student removed from the general education setting for more than 20% of the day.

**Non-Certified Teachers:**
This House bill would provide that public school districts may hire non-certified teachers if a certified teacher is not available (given certain requirements are met). The Senate amendments to the House bill largely make the program a pilot and only certain districts are eligible. The bill was sent to conference to work out the differences.

**Transparency & Integrity in Education:**
S. 945 seeks to promote public access to school board meetings by requiring school boards to live stream meetings. S. 945 was read a third time and returned to the Senate with amendments. The committee added language from H. 5183, the Transparency and Integrity in Education Act earlier sent to the Senate, which was not sent back. This language calls for closer scrutiny and say in the curriculum taught to our children.

**Medical Ethics & Diversity:**
Also being discussed in conference committee is H. 4776 the ‘Medical Ethics and Diversity Act’. This bill protects the rights of health care professionals, medical students, and health care insurance payers so they can choose NOT to participate in health care services, or pay for them, when the procedure violates their ethics or conscience. Additionally, it protects them from civil, criminal, or administrative actions that could be taken against them.

**“South Carolina Opioid Recovery Act”:**
The “South Carolina Opioid Recovery Act” has been ratified. It helps to combat the major opioid crisis facing the United States by establishing the South Carolina Opioid Recovery Fund (and other related entities) which qualify South Carolina to receive resources to combat the opioid crisis.

**The ‘Carolina Squat’:**
S. 908, a bill banning the “Carolina Squat” or the “California Lean”, has landed in conference committee. Upon passage, driving a car or truck on SC highways that has been altered or ‘squatted’ exceeding specific height requirements will be penalized.

**Tax Credits for Infrastructure Projects:**
A bill was signed into law by the Governor that increases utilities infrastructure project license tax credits for working on infrastructure and economic development projects. This increases the maximum tax credit that may be claimed by a company from $400k to $600k a year for contributing to these developments, especially in disadvantaged counties of our state.
In Freedom,

State Rep. Russell Fry
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=b2bcb01755&e=44ebe864a7)
---
| | [](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=62ed8dcf3e&e=44ebe864a7)
---
| | [](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=95731b903a&e=44ebe864a7)
---
| | [](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=7fefa9c67e&e=44ebe864a7)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Rep. Russell Fry, All rights reserved._
We send newsletters to constituents, family, and friends, keeping you updated on South Carolina politics.

**Our mailing address is:**
Rep. Russell FryP.O. Box 14444Surfside Beach, SC 29587
[Add us to your address book](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=3170fd5182)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=3170fd5182&e=44ebe864a7&c=4acc86e883) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=3170fd5182&e=44ebe864a7&c=4acc86e883).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&afl=1)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Garcia for Congress
body:
We have the opportunity to DESTROY Pelosi's majority.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519302:6ogtsXonN:m:1:3253819041:34FF0D7558A6D802867F760BA28E5A03:r)
---
Peter,
---
Nancy Pelosi is furious that I beat her handpicked candidate TWICE in this toss-up district in deep-blue California that she must win to save her House majority.
---
That's why she ordered her cronies to GERRYMANDER my seat during the redistricting process. _Joe Biden would have won my new district by 12 points._
---
**But as a former Navy Fighter Pilot, I 've spent my career taking on some of the toughest battles life can throw my way, so I REFUSED to surrender. **
---
_We 've already defied the odds TWICE to win this seat, and now, with only days to go until Election Day in California, our grassroots support has propelled us to a narrow 3-point lead._
---
To get across the finish line, I need the biggest conservatives in America to step up and help my campaign secure the last-minute funds we need to win big on Tuesday.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me defeat my Democrat opponent on Tuesday and DESTROY Pelosi 's only shot at saving her House majority. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519302:6ogtsXonN:m:1:3253819041:34FF0D7558A6D802867F760BA28E5A03:r)

California doesn't have an ordinary primary system.
---
Instead, all candidates run in a single primary, regardless of party, with the top two finishers advancing to the general election.
---
_That means we need to finish in the top two just to get on the ballot in November, but it also gives us the chance to deal a crushing blow to our opponent 's campaign. _
---
If we win big and finish first, we'll have all the momentum heading into the general election.
---
But if we come up short and finish second, we'll cede the advantage to my radical liberal opponent, who marched with BLM protesters and voted to defund the police.
---
Pelosi, Soros, and her woke corporate megadonors would also jump on that perceived weakness by spending millions more to defeat me in November.
---
**_I can 't emphasize enough just how important it is for us to win big on Tuesday._**

Nancy Pelosi can't keep control of her House majority if she loses this race.

Every path to a Democrat victory in November involves defeating me and winning this all-important seat.

With your support, we can end Pelosi's hopes of staying in power and usher in one of the biggest red waves in American history.

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: This headline says it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Abbott puts the people of Texas last.
#
Did you see this headline?
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220605-1.GYv_iE&refcode=ema20220605-192277&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=192277%2E444211%2EUY0vnh)
Greg Abbott was faced with a choice on the day of the Uvalde school shooting. He could either go to his campaign fundraiser 300 miles away from where he was, or he could drive 240 miles — a shorter distance — to the community that had just been attacked. **He chose to count dollars while they were still counting bodies.**
This is the story of Greg Abbott’s time in office: he consistently puts politics over people and campaign checks over our communities.
Last year, the power grid failed on Abbott’s watch as over 700 Texans lost their lives. Greg Abbott was left with a choice: serve the people of Texas by finally fixing the grid, or serve his major donors in the oil and gas industries by letting them off the hook for price gouging Texans.
You can guess what he chose:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220605-1.GYv_iE&refcode=ema20220605-192277&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=192277%2E444211%2EUY0vnh)
Here’s the bottom line: **Greg Abbott is making a bet.** He’s betting that if he chooses special interests over the people of Texas, he’ll be able to spend so much money on his re-election — his campaign has promised to deploy over $100,000,000 — that he can still win, even though he’s failed our state over and over.
It’s up to us to make sure he loses that bet. It’s up to us to hold Greg Abbott fully accountable.
[ Abbott has failed to keep Texans safe. clean_body: Abbott puts the people of Texas last. Did you see this headline? Greg Abbott was faced with a choice on the day of the Uvalde school shooting. He could either go to his campaign fundraiser 300 miles away from where he was, or he could drive 240 miles — a shorter distance — to the community that had just been attacked. He chose to count dollars while they were still counting bodies. This is the story of Greg Abbott’s time in office: he consistently puts politics over people and campaign checks over our communities. Last year, the power grid failed on Abbott’s watch as over 700 Texans lost their lives. Greg Abbott was left with a choice: serve the people of Texas by finally fixing the grid, or serve his major donors in the oil and gas industries by letting them off the hook for price gouging Texans. You can guess what he chose: Here’s the bottom line: Greg Abbott is making a bet. He’s betting that if he chooses special interests over the people of Texas, he’ll be able to spend so much money on his re-election — his campaign has promised to deploy over $100,000,000 — that he can still win, even though he’s failed our state over and over. It’s up to us to make sure he loses that bet. It’s up to us to hold Greg Abbott fully accountable. It’s time for the governor of Texas to put the people of Texas first. Thank you for doing your part, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

I’m running in the newly drawn NY-19 Congressional District, and I need your help!

Our new district spans 11 counties across the Hudson Valley and Southern Tier, and while I’ve already visited every single county at least once, I’ve still got a whole lot of folks to meet.

We’re putting a lot of miles on the car (it’s about four hours from end to end!), and getting our message out in this district is going to be exceedingly difficult. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we raise resources from grassroots supporters like you, Peter.

**And with everything that’s on the line in November, we can’t afford to fall short now.**

clean_body: I’m running in the newly drawn NY-19 Congressional District, and I need your help! | = | Peter, It’s Josh. = I’m running in the newly drawn NY-19 Congressional District, and I need your help! Our new district spans 11 counties across the Hudson Valley and Southern Tier, and while I’ve already visited every single county at least once, I’ve still got a whole lot of folks to meet. We’re putting a lot of miles on the car (it’s about four hours from end to end!), and getting our message out in this district is going to be exceedingly difficult. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we raise resources from grassroots supporters like you, Peter. And with everything that’s on the line in November, we can’t afford to fall short now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Remember, unlike my opponents, I’ve refused to take ANY corporate PAC money, so your contributions are driving this campaign, and I’m incredibly grateful. | | Join us at the MONUMENT TO WOMEN VETERANS in Pensacola on June 21, 2022 for a community event celebrating the longest day of the year! As an Earth scientist, one of the coolest days of the year for me has always been the summer solstice. This year, I have the chance to host a party for the people of Pensacola, so please join us, bring your kids, your questions, and your support for this free event! We'll have food trucks, music, science education booths, bounce houses, music and more! We'll have scientists speaking about the different planetary and Earth processes that make our planet amazing! This event is free and open to the public. name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Get a signed copy of my riveting new memoir 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| |
---
| | | Hi Peter,

I tried to reach out to you earlier.

**I know you 're a strong defender of Conservative values, so I put aside a signed copy of my new memoir, _Here 's the Deal_, for you.**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519232:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "NEW RELEASE - CLAIM MY SIGNED COPY! - GET MY
BOOK")
---

But it looks like you failed to claim your signed copy. I think you would love this book because you have always stood up and defended conservative values, just like me. So get your signed copy now!

_**[Chip in now to help House Conservatives take back the House, and I'll send you a signed copy of my new memoir.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519232:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Chip in now to help House Conservatives take back the House, and I’ll send you a signed
copy of my new memoir.")**_
_**Here 's the Deal **_**by Kellyanne Conway**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519232:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Generic Button")
---
In my new book I share in my own words, how I led President Trump to victory and became the first female to ever manage a winning presidential campaign.

If you've always wanted a behind the scenes look at Trump's time in the White House and his 2016 victory, now's your chance. BUT these books are selling out fast, so it's important you claim yours now.

_**[Pitch in now to help take back the House, and get a signed copy of my riveting new memoir>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519232:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Pitch in now
to help take back the House, and get a signed copy of my riveting new memoir >>>")**_

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway

---
_**Here 's the Deal **_**by Kellyanne Conway**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519232:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519233:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519233:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Can we count
on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519233:Jx9vTXoNo:m:1:3317145305:0C3702E2A975148C3E260A42FFE9BF17:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.
---

Can you sign our petition to join Liz in demanding action for common sense gun violence prevention legislation?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46159991/349074838/-471267517?refcode=em_pet_2022.06.05_b1_tm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Q3Y2Q5Zi0wOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCc23b_Y8cci_9_Uxm4-GxbmTsAHPEY-FWou2doowZg=) Hey Peter, Friday, June 3rd, was National Gun Violence Awareness Day and this weekend is Wear Orange Weekend, when thousands of people across the country come together to demand a future that is free from gun violence. **Enough is enough.** We should not have to live in fear that gunfire can ring out at any moment, whether it’s at school, the grocery store, the hospital, the movie theater, a nightclub or any other place. Liz always rolls up her sleeves and gets to work for Iowa families, and she won’t accept inaction. We have to fix this, and it starts with common sense legislation. [**Peter, Liz is demanding action addressing gun violence across the United States. Can you join her by adding your name to our petition calling for common sense gun legislation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46159992/349074839/1195947465?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Q3Y2Q5Zi0wOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCc23b_Y8cci_9_Uxm4-GxbmTsAHPEY-FWou2doowZg=&emci=adf0ae3e-14e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=77d7cd9f-09e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6566505) | [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46159993/349074840/2137362996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Q3Y2Q5Zi0wOWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCc23b_Y8cci_9_Uxm4-GxbmTsAHPEY-FWou2doowZg=&emci=adf0ae3e-14e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=77d7cd9f-09e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6566505)

As a journalist and State Senator, Liz has seen the impact that gun violence has had on Iowa families. She has mourned with survivors and told victims’ stories. As a mother, she knows that every more child, sister, brother, friend, or neighbor lost to gun violence is a tragedy that tears our communities apart.
**Liz believes in working towards a bipartisan solution that would require background checks on all gun sales, whether at a shop, a gun show, or online.** Now is not the time to stay silent, now is the time to work towards a solution.

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: A quick survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It’s critical we receive as many responses as possible, so click below to get started:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=493%2E61531%2E95pGh9)
Hello,
Spring is quickly becoming summer, and we’re hard at work laying the groundwork that will elect Peter as Vermont’s next senator.
That’s why we’re reaching out to you directly to find out which issues impact you and your community.
[**Click here to take our June issues survey. It won’t take you long.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220605_s_t_june&t=3&akid=493%2E61531%2E95pGh9)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220605_s_t_june&t=7&t=8&akid=493%2E61531%2E95pGh9)
---
So much of what we’re fighting for—from protecting our democracy to tackling inflation challenges—is at stake these midterms, and we’re in this together because that’s the only way we’ll win.
That’s why we’re hoping to hear from you on how you’ve been most impacted. Your stories are essential, and we appreciate you taking the time to share them with Peter.
[**This quick issues survey will help get Peter’s progressive voice to the Senate. It’s critical we receive as many responses as possible, so click here to get started.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220605_s_t_june&t=4&akid=493%2E61531%2E95pGh9)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220605_s_t_june&t=7&t=10&akid=493%2E61531%2E95pGh9)
---
Thank you!
Team Welch

We’re emailing to ask you for $5.

Chuck Grassley has Big Pharma, Wall Street, the NRA, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs ready to pour millions of dollars into ads smearing Mike. But we are relying 100% on donations from everyday people like you. Mike doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money.
A new poll shows Chuck Grassley is only 3 points ahead of Mike Franken, but the only way we’ll take the lead and turn Iowa blue is if we hit every single fundraising goal – and right now, we’re still short of our critical fundraising goal with time running out.

And if Mike Franken wins, Democrats WILL expand our majority in the Senate so we can actually pass progressive legislation. Chuck Grassley has Big Pharma, Wall Street, the NRA, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs ready to pour millions of dollars into ads smearing Mike. But we are relying 100% on donations from everyday people like you. Mike doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money. A new poll shows Chuck Grassley is only 3 points ahead of Mike Franken, but the only way we’ll take the lead and turn Iowa blue is if we hit every single fundraising goal – and right now, we’re still short of our critical fundraising goal with time running out. With control of the Senate on the line, we’re counting on your immediate donation to keep our new TV ads on the air, so we have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Every dollar you give today will bring us closer to finally ending Chuck Grassley’s decades-long political career. A.G. Holder is right, friend:

We’ve accomplished _a lot_ since the NDRC launched in 2017 with a mission to end Republican gerrymandering. We’ve helped **break GOP supermajorities** in state legislatures, **flip some chambers outright, elect Democratic governors** who fiercely oppose gerrymandered maps, and **promote successful fair maps ballot initiatives.**

Some experts have even noted that, thanks in part to our work, the next elections will take place on the fairest maps we’ve seen in a generation. _That’s_ the difference we’ve made together.

But friends, **there’s still more left to do – a lot more.** And this work isn’t always smooth sailing. In states like Florida, Republicans have ignored the will of the voters entirely to pass manipulated maps despite the fact that fair maps ballot initiatives passed over a decade ago. That’s why we’re getting ready to fight back in the states, in the courts, and at the ballot box this November.

The NDRC and our affiliates have experts on the ground who are doing the hard work needed to end gerrymandering every single day — but that work takes resources, and **we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you** to help the NDRC raise what we need to keep up the fight.

**Will you answer A.G. Holder’s call to action and pitch in anything you can right now to help the NDRC keep up the fight for fair maps?**

| | Team, Yesterday, I took the stage at our state’s Democratic Convention and asked my fellow Democrats to stand with core tenets of our party platform and put courage over politics. **And they did.** When put to the test with party insiders, many pundits and journalists debated whether our campaign would even garner the 15% of delegate support needed to make the ballot this September. Instead, we won 29% of the vote, **making this campaign the first time a woman of color has been on the ballot for Governor in Massachusetts history.** [**Click here to watch my speech from Convention and chip in $29 to celebrate our team winning 29% of the vote!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160398/349077923/-47692895?refcode=06_05_22_conventionspeech_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQwMDlkOS0wYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyCYak4467vuvSsUht7dmbOcB4ZEBaoU2Ta7yljngYg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160399/349077924/-47692895?refcode=06_05_22_conventionspeech_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQwMDlkOS0wYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyCYak4467vuvSsUht7dmbOcB4ZEBaoU2Ta7yljngYg=) Our campaign isn’t favored by the Beacon Hill establishment, but this team made clear with yesterday’s victory: Our movement is growing, and we’re ready to hit the phones and knock every door from now until September. I’m honored to be on the trail every day, making history with each of you. Saludos, Sonia

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I know what it takes to win in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
I know what it'll take to defeat Sen. Grassley.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160419/349078191/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFhMjdkZi0wYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5NCr6SXcMl9JYF8alQWiF6uqQbdQabY-vO7aU4rAsQ=)
Peter, I know what it'll take to defeat Sen. Grassley. You see, when I was 28, I took on another millionaire incumbent who had just won reelection.
People said I was too young to run for Congress, that I didn't have what it takes to take on a man like him, that a woman still paying off her student loans couldn't defeat a man who wrote his campaign a $500,000 check, that our grassroots team wasn't powerful enough to take on the deep-pocketed Washington elites backing my opponent. _**We proved them wrong.**_
That November, we moved the margin by 12 points and flipped his seat. I knew they were wrong because I know Iowa – **and I know that together, we can win again in 2022.**
Trust me, Iowa is ready to show Sen. Grassley the door and elect new leadership. I hear it on the road talking with voters, and I feel it in my bones. Don't just take it from me, though: data shows Sen. Grassley is at record-low approval ratings after only 27% of likely voters said that they want to send him back to Washington.
**I know what it takes to defeat someone like Sen. Grassley because I've done it before.** The only way to win a seat like this one is with hard work, a scrappy team and a powerful base of grassroots support. That's where you come in, Peter. To compete with GOP spending and reach the most critical voters, we need people like you to invest in our campaign.
**[So please, can you chip in your first donation of $5 or whatever you can spare before 11:59 p.m.? Every dollar gets us closer to victory on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160420/349078192/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFhMjdkZi0wYWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5NCr6SXcMl9JYF8alQWiF6uqQbdQabY-vO7aU4rAsQ=)**

You see, when I was 28, I took on another millionaire incumbent who had just won reelection. People said I was too young to run for Congress, that I didn't have what it takes to take on a man like him, that a woman still paying off her student loans couldn't defeat a man who wrote his campaign a $500,000 check, that our grassroots team wasn't powerful enough to take on the deep-pocketed Washington elites backing my opponent. We proved them wrong. That November, we moved the margin by 12 points and flipped his seat. I knew they were wrong because I know Iowa – and I know that together, we can win again in 2022. Trust me, Iowa is ready to show Sen. Grassley the door and elect new leadership. I hear it on the road talking with voters, and I feel it in my bones. Don't just take it from me, though: data shows Sen. Grassley is at record-low approval ratings after only 27% of likely voters said that they want to send him back to Washington. I know what it takes to defeat someone like Sen. Grassley because I've done it before. The only way to win a seat like this one is with hard work, a scrappy team and a powerful base of grassroots support. That's where you come in, Peter. To compete with GOP spending and reach the most critical voters, we need people like you to invest in our campaign. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for having my back here. – Abby | |

body:
The choice is ours!
| Team — **This is Attorney General Ken Paxton,_once again the Republican nominee for AG_ , in his 2015 mugshot:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160527/349079443/-1732238401?refcode=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2UzNDg0My0wY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_V1lEhMao2N6Y-t3bs8l_flpYIdilf4e67gjS4y7vI=) In 2015, he was indicted on _felony charges_. More than six years later, he’s _still_ under indictment, and his top aides have accused him of abusing the power of the Attorney General’s office. _But that’s not all we can give Ken credit for._ ❌ He’s currently suing the federal government to stop enforcing regulations on gun silencers made in Texas. ❌ He fought to dismantle the Affordable Care Act — despite the fact that nearly 2 million Texans rely on it for care. ❌ He tried to OVERTURN the 2020 presidential election — and then billed TX taxpayers for his defense from misconduct complaints related to his suit. ❌ Among other attacks on LGBTQ+ Texans, he decreed that parents who facilitate gender-affirming care for their trans kids are committing _child abuse._ ❌ And he led the charge to defend the GOP’s dangerous abortion ban in court. **[DEFEAT KEN PAXTON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160530/349079447/-1732238401?refcode=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2UzNDg0My0wY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_V1lEhMao2N6Y-t3bs8l_flpYIdilf4e67gjS4y7vI=)** Fortunately, Ken Paxton ISN’T our only option for AG. **_This is Rochelle Garza, Democratic nominee for Attorney General, and she’s ready to take back the AG’s office _for the people_ :_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160532/349079449/-1732238401?refcode=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.ace34843-0ce5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2UzNDg0My0wY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_V1lEhMao2N6Y-t3bs8l_flpYIdilf4e67gjS4y7vI=) Rochelle will call for commonsense gun safety laws, stand up for workers and families, protect access to the ballot box, fight for the right to reproductive choice, and ensure that corrupt politicians are held accountable for their misdeeds. She’s already proven that she’s a fighter for the people. As a lawyer, Rochelle reinforced the constitutionality of reproductive choice when she won a federal case for a pregnant immigrant teen — now, immigrant teens have to be notified of their right to abortion care. _(She beat Brett Kavanaugh, Ken Paxton, and the Trump administration in court, too.)_ With _Roe v. Wade_ in imminent danger, it’s never been more important to elect strong, pro-choice leaders at every level of government. **We just secured a win in the runoff primary — but we had to spend down to $0 to do it. name: Shahid Buttar
subject: You have more power than you know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
We’re giving thanks for all the support we’ve received as we bear down on the jungle primary in just 2 days! | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O8ugsjkSqGxwZfbsjVXcwDfUHPAWym9s7HZJXNSlcjjByHpninr0x88I7sQv-sMZBMXT-IQRuaCFRrm-YqC_RxIu1li4E2Qk_mH91WjdGWPl9583vZ1_esJ0OF3kaYIfGj32V9NqXWrXaH5BXB8MmxGDeXoXTWqEaxoXexR4FzRGCFivATdiVtDGVlo1ZnObsQxBdfXXrvKA6o5PmYKRn7hwOG247yJyY96juWJdSIiadbQc3b2xV0fdh4zn5nZwfwgA8U8gbWHznKTyPERVnck/3mn/KFinjOeOTx6b6Z5qwlyGyQ/h0/tDMtPrVKcKC7ZWVtkZhXRfNU8cjqoWOtpN1bDRC5SR4)
| | Dear Peter, As we bear down on the jungle primary in just two days, we’re moved to share gratitude for all of our supporters—especially the many volunteers who have helped inform our neighbors about their choices, and spread our campaign message far and wide across the city of San Francisco. From the Mission to the Marina, and from the Sunset to the Fillmore, we’ve been recruiting supportive merchants to help promote our campaign in commercial corridors. That’s just one way that we’re working around the media whiteout obscuring our race from voters. [**Can you contribute today to help us sprint across the finish line this week?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLLrA1_g8ebivffn9Mt7yVk2Oip3annv0JjELREvOTWRtLFWY5MPiXffY-vMXLi5_jWwYni0tsFx9B3PcZeax_-y9B3IrQNm00f-a2VRiyEgCNCiqxjPVgoSNuwTsoBNfPch5I_hR_qGgO4uJNqHLs2LdBwFvrBqeHpjMFaYFSKfV-PJhWCh9Vq45-a9mVUJkV6o9k4Qj4MXbtkEef7f6Hy4eMeNFXnXlc-JPxc0GQjqDJIEp2LnFAFoeMpLEE_Lbg2BX1NPIuZ5N1HIBffRXwOEBDhN7L7JacYQscwUTDTSQ/3mn/KFinjOeOTx6b6Z5qwlyGyQ/h1/8VJ89Y8hUbJxcbTxLYNKsS0c21WSPZEWSxAhlAtJQQg) Another way we’ve worked around the refusal of the press to cover the election, or the incumbent’s various hypocrisies, is by training and mobilizing supporters to engage and inform journalists. Their work has made a palpable difference. For instance, it was a local San Francisco supporter who works in tech who pitched the story to an SF Examiner columnist that led to the only article published in local print media covering Tuesday’s jungle primary. Empowering volunteers as the face of our campaign has been a consistent strategy since we first launched. Tonight, you are invited to a virtual outreach workshop via zoom during which we will train supporters how to take advantage of some new digital tools that we’ve configured. [**Join us tonight to learn how you can independently inform and identify voters beyond those targeted by our campaign!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkxX3ah5QHi27_S3hqiq7heMc6eTTgnTlSUzjbUQQ4DhjM08AD2jP_elHPyfs7nkdaQv-o5bU87MJrJ-2ts8RuRnjkCEoFvv9FiZOhaDniLw3hyEPeZ_kXWkTBvNzqhpUNZPVFlaMl0HLDbpE1JzIj4LsC67Sbc_e071DJEV1CI5-2SYWwsctvgf5eLJNu6kPDS_QcC8W7rE7oMSgVGygABaDzNYGvqwrlJwDuX5V5hcha1hMTa9n4a6Gr6mFUNBNN06MB9-RYDo-ihwWQ_WV8Ng2KXhzgR5Q1QT1qDshtYRkDKIjWulY-DBE3Jr1n3TksfrfLJUfwLV0F1mfrQ21nEOEihBi0Bhp7EintkW3JhDQ/3mn/KFinjOeOTx6b6Z5qwlyGyQ/h2/MMKVlx1JNQaloItantFHntdlISTp4mmW5f3l8ubXZes) Another set of supporters for whom we are grateful are the ranks of our endorsers. From Matt Gonzalez, Gloria Berry, Eric Curry and the SF Bayview here in San Francisco, to Marianne Williamson, Gayle McLaughlin, and Susan Sarandon far beyond it, they’re each visionaries who share the rare courage to challenge the establishment. It takes independence to stand up to entrenched power. Not everyone has the stomach for it, for better or worse. That’s why each of their voices are so admirable to me. I’ve always been willing to take on risk, partly because I am less interested in today than I am in the future, and also because the corruption of our failing system has been apparent to me for 30 years. [**Can you donate today to support a voice who not only saw today’s crises coming, but worked—despite disadvantages—to prevent them?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLLrA1_g8ebivffn9Mt7yVk2Oip3annv0JjELREvOTWRv9oKIaE-dCcIQ9xW-DD2-E6rNSFLTqLfEq8zTPX7n-TCtthJfqft6MONl-o5fz20wPSL0pBBIBcUGRtmAkuT_7J8YzdgzGd6QvmyNLxg38KtPelMv_JtYtHRVgIAuiqYFnpforJ4FnxGCbZ2YaqGPDBKM4-XBXgB6-MeVDKWCztbyRDyoXO6uYubDJxC1KBRfQv-OcAc3_apFYLY9DwI9iGw9Id2V4oV20GwFMhx2MuGKBrrDB5vytivCknEwaafw/3mn/KFinjOeOTx6b6Z5qwlyGyQ/h3/KS-78GxXRyz7lQJWc0NrP0Iql3bgOwIGCy8L-wJImaA) Losing a home to foreclosure as a teen has a way of forcing one’s eyes wide open. And while I would not wish that experience on anyone, I’m grateful for the insight and perspective that it led me to. Understanding the view of our empire from the bottom of the boot helped me put my training and skills to better use. Rather than monetize them, as most in my generation chose to do, I’ve spent 20 years focusing them on holding entrenched power accountable from San Francisco to Washington. **Thank you for standing with us** as we work to liberate San Francisco’s voice in Washington, and to secure a vote in Congress committed to visionary policies supporting the future we all share! clean_body: We’re giving thanks for all the support we’ve received as we bear down on the jungle primary in just 2 days! | | | | | Dear Peter, As we bear down on the jungle primary in just two days, we’re moved to share gratitude for all of our supporters—especially the many volunteers who have helped inform our neighbors about their choices, and spread our campaign message far and wide across the city of San Francisco. From the Mission to the Marina, and from the Sunset to the Fillmore, we’ve been recruiting supportive merchants to help promote our campaign in commercial corridors. That’s just one way that we’re working around the media whiteout obscuring our race from voters. Another way we’ve worked around the refusal of the press to cover the election, or the incumbent’s various hypocrisies, is by training and mobilizing supporters to engage and inform journalists. Their work has made a palpable difference. For instance, it was a local San Francisco supporter who works in tech who pitched the story to an SF Examiner columnist that led to the only article published in local print media covering Tuesday’s jungle primary. Empowering volunteers as the face of our campaign has been a consistent strategy since we first launched. Tonight, you are invited to a virtual outreach workshop via zoom during which we will train supporters how to take advantage of some new digital tools that we’ve configured. Another set of supporters for whom we are grateful are the ranks of our endorsers. From Matt Gonzalez, Gloria Berry, Eric Curry and the SF Bayview here in San Francisco, to Marianne Williamson, Gayle McLaughlin, and Susan Sarandon far beyond it, they’re each visionaries who share the rare courage to challenge the establishment. It takes independence to stand up to entrenched power. Not everyone has the stomach for it, for better or worse. That’s why each of their voices are so admirable to me. I’ve always been willing to take on risk, partly because I am less interested in today than I am in the future, and also because the corruption of our failing system has been apparent to me for 30 years. Losing a home to foreclosure as a teen has a way of forcing one’s eyes wide open. And while I would not wish that experience on anyone, I’m grateful for the insight and perspective that it led me to. Understanding the view of our empire from the bottom of the boot helped me put my training and skills to better use. Rather than monetize them, as most in my generation chose to do, I’ve spent 20 years focusing them on holding entrenched power accountable from San Francisco to Washington. Thank you for standing with us as we work to liberate San Francisco’s voice in Washington, and to secure a vote in Congress committed to visionary policies supporting the future we all share! Your voice, Shahid PS -- Join us for (at Divisadero & Fell in the Lower Haight) on Tuesday! And whether or not you can join us that night, to learn how you can leverage our latest digital tools to inform your friends about their choices on the ballot! | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . From pilots, to athletes, to students, everyone is getting on the "Let's Go Brandon!" train - _the only thing left is for you to get your hands on your very own boat flag!_

**NOW ...** it's your turn to act and get your order in ASAP!

body:

I know you hear from me a lot, especially ahead of key moments like our public FEC deadlines. But I just had to reach out now about something even more urgent.

We're now 156 days away from Nov. 8: The most consequential midterm election we've faced in a long time. We need to use _every single day_ to save our Democratic Senate, which is why we've started setting daily fundraising goals to make sure we hold on to our razor-thin majority.

**But there's a problem:** Right now, we're $13,814 shy of today's goal, and if we fail now, it could start an insurmountable snowball effect. We can’t afford to hand the Senate back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask:

**[Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to hit our daily goal and defend our razor-thin Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/8269?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220605-ChuckSchumer-jtk2143-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220605-ChuckSchumer-jtk2143-Pros-sl1&akid=4594%2E9716520%2ETqiB9-)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
