| Arizona deserves a leader, and that isn’t David Schweikert. Throughout his time in Congress, Shady Schweikert has only done what’s best for him, not what’s best for the people of Arizona. [_**So, rush a donation immediately to kick Shady Schweikert to the curb and elect a leader that will fight for the things that matter**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46160588/349079818/1388030255?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220605-1-em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWUyNDEzNy0wZWU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PysweqjbONb5_hFq5xKGKQfF5EQPdlZBKveUF2br0s=).

Actions speak louder than words, and David Schweikert has shown us time and time again that he doesn’t care about working for everyday Arizonans. He’s been fined by both the Federal Elections Commission and the House Ethics Committee for misusing campaign funds. And, his voting record is further proof of how little he cares. He’s voted against policies that would:
1. Make insulin more affordable.
2. Protect abortion and reproductive healthcare.
3. Address the country’s shortage of baby formula.

**We can't afford another two years of Shady Schweikert representing us in Congress.

clean_body: Arizona deserves a leader, and that isn’t David Schweikert. | = | Arizona deserves a leader, and that isn’t David Schweikert. Throughout his time in Congress, Shady Schweikert has only done what’s best for him, not what’s best for the people of Arizona. =. | | | = Actions speak louder than words, and David Schweikert has shown us time and time again that he doesn’t care about working for everyday Arizonans. He’s been fined by both the Federal Elections Commission and the House Ethics Committee for misusing campaign funds. And, his voting record is further proof of how little he cares. He’s voted against policies that would: 1. Make insulin more affordable. 2. Protect abortion and reproductive healthcare. 3. Address the country’s shortage of baby formula. We can't afford another two years of Shady Schweikert representing us in Congress. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = * | | = Paid for by Friends of Jevin D. Hodge Friends of Jevin D. | | Peter, In the wake of a week of gun violence, our campaign is standing up to say **enough is enough.** This weekend, Team Lafazan was proud to be a part of national Wear Orange Weekend to show our strong support for gun safety reform. Peter, the only way we're ever going to see gun safety reform is if we expand our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. clean_body: | | | | Peter, In the wake of a week of gun violence, our campaign is standing up to say enough is enough. This weekend, Team Lafazan was proud to be a part of national Wear Orange Weekend to show our strong support for gun safety reform. Peter, the only way we're ever going to see gun safety reform is if we expand our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. = Our Republican opponent in this race talks big about wanting to keep our schools safe. And yet, he refuses to support taking any steps – banning assault weapons, establishing universal background checks, even passing safe storage laws – to protect our children. All he's done is follow the same playbook gun extremists have followed for years: offer empty thoughts and hollow prayers and wait for the public to move on. = More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. name: Our Revolution!
subject: we’re taking on Trump, Marjorie Taylor Greene and the radical right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

This week, Congress will hold investigatory hearings on the role elected
officials — like Trump, Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene — played
in plotting the January 6th attack on the Capitol.

But the truth is this — while Congress has the power to investigate and
expose, it has no power to prosecute and punish.

That’s why Our Revolution and our partners at Free Speech for People have
been organizing for months to demand state election officials enforce the
Constitution and bar criminal insurrectionists from the ballot.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Ban_criminals/?t=1008&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]The responsibility to enforce the Constitution in this matter is
entrusted to Secretaries of State — join us and sign our petition to tell
them to do their jobs and stop insurrectionists from serving in the US
Government!

We don’t want to discount the significance of this week’s hearings.

Importantly, the Congressional hearings will remind Americans of
established facts — Donald Trump and other elected officials plotted a
violent rebellion to interfere with the peaceful transfer of power.

But under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, it is state election officials
who are obligated to act on the evidence and disqualify from re-election
any office holder who swore an oath to uphold the Constitution and then
“engage[s] in insurrection or rebellion against the [United States], or
gives aid or comfort to [our] enemies.”

On behalf of our 1 million supporters nationwide, Our Revolution is
demanding all Secretaries of State use this Constitutional provision to
ban insurrectionists from the ballot just as they routinely exercise their
authority to ban candidates who do not meet age or residency requirements.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Ban_criminals/?t=1009&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]Add your name to our petition and tell them to do their jobs and block
criminal insurrectionists from serving in government!

The evidence is clear — Donald Trump and others conspired to violate the
Constitution.

There must be concrete consequences for these oathbreakers, and it is up
to us to defend our country from the radical right before it's too late.

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=OR_EM_PT_45SP_20220605_1_1&t=1001&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=OR_EM_PT_45SP_20220605_1_1&t=1005&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=OR_EM_PT_45SP_20220605_1_1&t=1007&akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3000%2E5885482%2E0luh4P

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Reminder: Game On!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
Help Geoff defeat Maura Healey and save our state from her radical progressive agenda
| | | |
---
Dear Friend,
It's official -- Massachusetts Democrats have endorsed Maura Healey to be their party's preferred candidate for Governor.
I say: GAME ON.
---
| | [Show your support for Geoff!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G9sJbkBByoOkmfg9Jpg1NpdD701hhrHpuMNMSnlG2cQtxRG05BpM3jbizYSwu5p6NWfxg0vPOUD1tGaqndNemPSrUhV_NwRgBVbWxYv7IqqZuj2gX0xtEhsnYDCf_nCgdnq3MZTaQJxjujk22C9mhQE5z4-gVXamfAw-BdLAoS8OBPQA9A9-Cw==&c=nxc3JycfcMHFRO0QOS0FMLUgraVEiQSVien_RLynBk1LTpwyjMhsdA==&ch=ZAmS5jA9JjWytZt4PaWZ08RwVQFnSUWHeAt71G82J3MeCtlXQfDcSA==)
---
Make no mistake about it...
This is now a race for the future of Massachusetts.
If elected, Maura Healey and the radical progressive agenda she embraces would severely threaten the safety, freedom, and economic prosperity of every Bay State resident. She would become the most extreme, far-left Governor ever elected in our state's history.
Alongside a Democratic supermajority in the state Legislature and the abject failure of the Biden Administration in Washington, having Maura Healey in the Governor's office would be crippling to our economy and our way of life.
Maura Healey has spent years politicizing the Office of the Attorney General. In the process, she...

* repeatedly and flagrantly sued the previous administration to score gratuitous political points...

* drove businesses and jobs out of our state in the name of promoting her political agenda...

* abused her prosecutorial discretion to help advance her political career...

None of this has worked to the benefit of Massachusetts and its residents. Now, despite these failures, Maura Healey wants to be our next Governor?
---
| HELP DEFEAT MAURA HEALEY!
---
| | [Donate now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G9sJbkBByoOkmfg9Jpg1NpdD701hhrHpuMNMSnlG2cQtxRG05BpM3jbizYSwu5p6NWfxg0vPOUD1tGaqndNemPSrUhV_NwRgBVbWxYv7IqqZuj2gX0xtEhsnYDCf_nCgdnq3MZTaQJxjujk22C9mhQE5z4-gVXamfAw-BdLAoS8OBPQA9A9-Cw==&c=nxc3JycfcMHFRO0QOS0FMLUgraVEiQSVien_RLynBk1LTpwyjMhsdA==&ch=ZAmS5jA9JjWytZt4PaWZ08RwVQFnSUWHeAt71G82J3MeCtlXQfDcSA==)

---
| The message to Massachusetts voters heading into this fall's election is clear:

* If you want higher taxes, higher government spending, and even higher prices and hyper-inflation that make it impossible to live and do business in Massachusetts...

* If you want our state to hand out driver's licenses to illegal immigrants flooding through our nation's porous borders...

* If you are okay with power-hungry government bureaucrats telling you what you can and can't do, notwithstanding your sincerely-held religious beliefs, just to fuel their authority over you and even though it infringes on your Constitutional rights...

* If you are okay with your kids endlessly wearing masks in school and being taught to be ashamed to be American...

If all that is your vision for Massachusetts and its future, then Maura Healey is your candidate. Vote for Maura Healey and you can rest assured Massachusetts will plunge deeper into a progressive quagmire than ever before and that it will make our state unlivable for those who prize freedom, law and order, and economic prosperity.
However, it's your future, and you have a choice:

* If you prize freedom and equality of opportunity...

* If you think parents have a right to make decisions about their kids' education and healthcare...

* If you want someone with a track record of standing up to Beacon Hill and fighting for Massachusetts taxpayers...

* If you want to ensure the integrity of our elections....

* If you want Massachusetts to grow jobs and be a state where people want to live, not leave...

If you want this vision for our state and the success, prosperity, and freedom that comes with it, then I am your candidate. I am uniquely qualified to take on Maura Healey and the progressive wing of the Democrat Party and to save our state from the brink.
I look forward to a spirited campaign that emphasizes the profound contrast between Maura Healey and her extreme progressive politics, and the mainstream conservative principles I will bring to the Governor's office in the name of the People of Massachusetts.
---
| HELP GEOFF SAVE MASSACHUSETTS!

clean_body: Help Geoff defeat Maura Healey and save our state from her radical progressive agenda | | | | Dear Friend, It's official -- Massachusetts Democrats have endorsed Maura Healey to be their party's preferred candidate for Governor. I say: GAME ON. | | == Make no mistake about it... This is now a race for the future of Massachusetts. If elected, Maura Healey and the radical progressive agenda she embraces would severely threaten the safety, freedom, and economic prosperity of every Bay State resident. She would become the most extreme, far-left Governor ever elected in our state's history. Alongside a Democratic supermajority in the state Legislature and the abject failure of the Biden Administration in Washington, having Maura Healey in the Governor's office would be crippling to our economy and our way of life. Maura Healey has spent years politicizing the Office of the Attorney General. In the process, she... repeatedly and flagrantly sued the previous administration to score gratuitous political points... drove businesses and jobs out of our state in the name of promoting her political agenda... abused her prosecutorial discretion to help advance her political career... None of this has worked to the benefit of Massachusetts and its residents. Now, despite these failures, Maura Healey wants to be our next Governor? | HELP DEFEAT MAURA HEALEY! | | == | == | The message to Massachusetts voters heading into this fall's election is clear: If you want higher taxes, higher government spending, and even higher prices and hyper-inflation that make it impossible to live and do business in Massachusetts... If you want our state to hand out driver's licenses to illegal immigrants flooding through our nation's porous borders... If you are okay with power-hungry government bureaucrats telling you what you can and can't do, notwithstanding your sincerely-held religious beliefs, just to fuel their authority over you and even though it infringes on your Constitutional rights... If you are okay with your kids endlessly wearing masks in school and being taught to be ashamed to be American... If all that is your vision for Massachusetts and its future, then Maura Healey is your candidate. Vote for Maura Healey and you can rest assured Massachusetts will plunge deeper into a progressive quagmire than ever before and that it will make our state unlivable for those who prize freedom, law and order, and economic prosperity. However, it's your future, and you have a choice: If you prize freedom and equality of opportunity... If you think parents have a right to make decisions about their kids' education and healthcare... If you want someone with a track record of standing up to Beacon Hill and fighting for Massachusetts taxpayers... If you want to ensure the integrity of our elections.... If you want Massachusetts to grow jobs and be a state where people want to live, not leave... If you want this vision for our state and the success, prosperity, and freedom that comes with it, then I am your candidate. I am uniquely qualified to take on Maura Healey and the progressive wing of the Democrat Party and to save our state from the brink. I look forward to a spirited campaign that emphasizes the profound contrast between Maura Healey and her extreme progressive politics, and the mainstream conservative principles I will bring to the Governor's office in the name of the People of Massachusetts. | HELP GEOFF SAVE MASSACHUSETTS! | | == | Thanks for your support. Sincerely, | | | | | PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS | == | == == == | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: The power of $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s officially crunchtime,
Peter.

Now that we’re out of the primary, we’re officially in the race to beat
Rand Paul. Team Booker is driving all across Kentucky, knocking on doors,
putting up yard signs, meeting voters, and making sure anyone who’s hungry
for meaningful change in our Commonwealth turns out to vote.

Here’s photos of Team Booker at Hillbilly Days in Eastern Kentucky that we
attended to share our plan to replace Rand Paul:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220605.p8JFNl&refcode=em20220605-2025&t=1001&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220605.p8JFNl&refcode=em20220605-2025&t=1002&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU ][IMG]

The political movement we’re building on the ground in Kentucky is all
thanks to our grassroots donors. Every contribution you give helps us
knock on 1 more door, pass out 1 more mailer, and get 1 voter closer to
victory.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220605.p8JFNl&refcode=em20220605-2025&t=1022&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU ]Will you join our movement today and give $5 so we can reach as many
voters as possible? We’re racing to raise 7,500 grassroots contributions
by the end of the week to fund this work.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220605.p8JFNl&refcode=em20220605-2025&t=1023&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU ]Contribute $5

To give you an idea of how much it costs to run some of the plans that we
have, here’s a quick overview by the numbers.

* $0.05: The price of reaching one voter in Kentucky. If you chip in
$15, we’ll be able to reach 300 Kentuckians. Even $1.50 allows us to
reach 30 Kentuckians who may have never heard of Charles Booker
before.
* $15.28: The price of funding one voter registration team. Each of our
voter registration teams get clipboards, pens, printed materials to
share with voters, and training from our organizing team.
* $47.59: The price of gas to drive 395 miles — from the furthest point
of Kentucky to the other. Our staff and volunteers will be doing a lot
of driving to reach every corner of Kentucky to do our organizing
work. Contributions from our grassroots team, of any amount, will
literally fuel our work.

This is where the money goes,
Peter. Because we don’t accept
a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests, we’re relying on
support from you to afford these expenses.

So we have to ask one final time: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220605.p8JFNl&refcode=em20220605-2025&t=1024&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU ]Will you please chip in $5 or
whatever you can afford so we can fund our important organizing work?
We’re aiming to raise 7,500 grassroots contributions by the end of the
week.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220605-2025-footer&t=1025&refcode2=2025_346206_oZYGKU&akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2025%2E346206%2EoZYGKU

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
We have the opportunity to DESTROY Pelosi's majority.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519282:6JsekXoNx:m:1:3317145305:DBFD8A9827CD3D0A2E0E7C2D031D082A:r)
---
Peter,
---
Nancy Pelosi is furious that I beat her handpicked candidate TWICE in this toss-up district in deep-blue California that she must win to save her House majority.
---
That's why she ordered her cronies to GERRYMANDER my seat during the redistricting process. _Joe Biden would have won my new district by 12 points._
---
**But as a former Navy Fighter Pilot, I 've spent my career taking on some of the toughest battles life can throw my way, so I REFUSED to surrender. **
---
_We 've already defied the odds TWICE to win this seat, and now, with only days to go until Election Day in California, our grassroots support has propelled us to a narrow 3-point lead._
---
To get across the finish line, I need the biggest conservatives in America to step up and help my campaign secure the last-minute funds we need to win big on Tuesday.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me defeat my Democrat opponent on Tuesday and DESTROY Pelosi 's only shot at saving her House majority. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519282:6JsekXoNx:m:1:3317145305:DBFD8A9827CD3D0A2E0E7C2D031D082A:r)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519282:6JsekXoNx:m:1:3317145305:DBFD8A9827CD3D0A2E0E7C2D031D082A:r)
---

California doesn't have an ordinary primary system.
---
Instead, all candidates run in a single primary, regardless of party, with the top two finishers advancing to the general election.
---
_That means we need to finish in the top two just to get on the ballot in November, but it also gives us the chance to deal a crushing blow to our opponent 's campaign. _
---
If we win big and finish first, we'll have all the momentum heading into the general election.
---
But if we come up short and finish second, we'll cede the advantage to my radical liberal opponent, who marched with BLM protesters and voted to defund the police.
---
Pelosi, Soros, and her woke corporate megadonors would also jump on that perceived weakness by spending millions more to defeat me in November.
---
**_I can 't emphasize enough just how important it is for us to win big on Tuesday._**
---
[HELP US WIN THE NEW CA-27 ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60519282:6JsekXoNx:m:1:3317145305:DBFD8A9827CD3D0A2E0E7C2D031D082A:r)

Nancy Pelosi can't keep control of her House majority if she loses this race.
---
Every path to a Democrat victory in November involves defeating me and winning this all-important seat.
---
With your support, we can end Pelosi's hopes of staying in power and usher in one of the biggest red waves in American history.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I’d really like to hear from you, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Hi Derek, I just wanted to reach out to be sure you saw this email from my team.
| Hi Derek,

I just wanted to reach out to be sure you saw this email from my team.

**Derek, I’m not afraid to take on our region’s toughest issues – that’s what fighting for our common good is all about.** I know what it means to face a challenge head on. That same drive is what kept my buddies and I going when we served in Iraq, and it’s what’s leading me now in this campaign for Congress.

I’m ready to get to Washington, roll up my sleeves, and fight for hard-working families like my own. But this is a people-powered campaign, which means it’s not just about me – **it’s about you, Derek.** I want to hear directly from you about what issues are keeping you up at night, what difficult discussions you’re having at the kitchen table, and what’s worrying you about the future.

**[If you’d take a moment to fill out our priorities survey, it would mean a lot to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46161551/349084215/-1244627351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NjMWViNi0xOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wG6n0JFfi5EaixX0C3rGAdl_Rgh8HfU7LwvNUvimr8s=&emci=dd0c6e0e-51e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=47cc1eb6-18e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13185894)**

Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts with me and my team,

Chris Deluzio

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team Deluzio**
Date: Mon, May 23, 2022 at 6:06 PM
Subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46161552/349084216/1383944506?refcode=em_surv_2022.06.05_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NjMWViNi0xOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wG6n0JFfi5EaixX0C3rGAdl_Rgh8HfU7LwvNUvimr8s=) Hi team,

Now that Chris is on his way to the general election in November, our people-powered campaign wants to hear about issues that are impacting _you_ the most. [**That’s why we’re hoping you’ll take a moment to take our priorities survey today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46161553/349084217/-1244627351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NjMWViNi0xOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wG6n0JFfi5EaixX0C3rGAdl_Rgh8HfU7LwvNUvimr8s=&emci=dd0c6e0e-51e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=47cc1eb6-18e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13185894) | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46161554/349084218/-1244627351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NjMWViNi0xOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wG6n0JFfi5EaixX0C3rGAdl_Rgh8HfU7LwvNUvimr8s=&emci=dd0c6e0e-51e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=47cc1eb6-18e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13185894)
---
**Chris is ready to take on western Pennsylvania's toughest issues.** He knows how important it is to make stuff right here in western PA, strengthen our unions and worker protections, take on corporate greed, defend our right to vote, make healthcare not a ripoff, protect a woman’s right to choose abortion, and more.

**But more than anything, Chris knows how important it is to listen to people who live in Beaver and Allegheny Counties and learn about the issues that affect western Pennsylvania families the most.**

We’re running a people-powered campaign, which means we want to hear directly from supporters like you — not powerful special interests — about what issues matter the most.

[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you please take a moment to share your priorities with Chris and the rest of us over at Team Deluzio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46161555/349084219/-1244627351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NjMWViNi0xOGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wG6n0JFfi5EaixX0C3rGAdl_Rgh8HfU7LwvNUvimr8s=&emci=dd0c6e0e-51e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=47cc1eb6-18e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13185894)

Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts with us,

Team Deluzio

clean_body: Hi Derek, I just wanted to reach out to be sure you saw this email from my team. | Hi Derek, I just wanted to reach out to be sure you saw this email from my team. Derek, I’m not afraid to take on our region’s toughest issues – that’s what fighting for our common good is all about. I know what it means to face a challenge head on. That same drive is what kept my buddies and I going when we served in Iraq, and it’s what’s leading me now in this campaign for Congress. I’m ready to get to Washington, roll up my sleeves, and fight for hard-working families like my own. But this is a people-powered campaign, which means it’s not just about me – it’s about you, Derek. I want to hear directly from you about what issues are keeping you up at night, what difficult discussions you’re having at the kitchen table, and what’s worrying you about the future. But more than anything, Chris knows how important it is to listen to people who live in Beaver and Allegheny Counties and learn about the issues that affect western Pennsylvania families the most. subject: Need to stay ahead in June
body:
June is the last month of the second quarter, which means we have a big deadline at the end of the month.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HZiD5a7rUDJkm5JBj_sjDwLM5nTyNXUjWgEPbh--IGg8kDKsQtLGVvuZ_KmDdIafoD6DOeZr2lajnNorugbuXmce_qHa67G3vdd7vuH0fRz6cRx_4xN6C67SpHSXa3YyMeC3xCvPU8J3n4wtkxHlunIibfkoIV0RQf-wwjOAL22_x8SV4WJGbi_uhc96mwabGFrJlYrDnLAuVk45kwdE_Za1ocDmSYw3&c=QNCVhHkoNCjXU1NEFcER5P2tx2K6Ba8jsKW-FHPAqT9iYIrk_FQydw==&ch=pP_bkHrejEsycolYt39VYwJ4-ll3T55e19-3uy2no5asBJhFKjJwIA==)

| Friend
Hey, it's Kat.
June is the last month of the second quarter, which means we have a big deadline at the end of the month. Thanks to the grit and determination of patriots such as yourself, we have been able to stay neck and neck with the Far-Left's fundraising efforts.
However, that hasn't stopped Pelosi from courting her ultra-billionaire donors to keep her party afloat.
I need your help to get a head start this June and send the message this quarter: America First is the future of Congress.

| The slim majority has been putting the American people last from every angle. While American mothers are forced to scrounge for baby formula, Biden sends PALLETS of baby food to illegal migrants at our wide-open border.
Sadly, this is yet another far-left policy used to keep hard-working Americans down. I will always do everything possible to keep the Socialist agenda in check.

body:
I know you're busy, but I wanted to follow up on my note about my sister Maggie.
Hey folks, I know you're busy, but I wanted to follow up on my note about my sister Maggie.
---
It's crucial that we keep Maggie's voice in the Senate – and I'm doing everything I can to ensure she wins reelection this November.
This race means a lot to me. Not just because Maggie is my sister, but also because the future of our Senate majority is _really_ important. And if Maggie loses, Democrats could lose their majority and all the progress they've made.
So please, will you rush a donation now to Maggie's campaign?
Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162344/349087493/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMThhNS0xYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d4IUu5L6SNjfN1nc7MMHd2LGFA4G0doaS--WsIxPKs=)**
Thank you,
Frank Wood
\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Frank Wood**
Date: Mon, May 30, 2022
Subject: We need my sister Maggie in the Senate
| | |
---
Hi team, Frank Wood here. You may recognize my face from television, where I try to hold your attention by playing a part. Today, I would like to direct your attention to my sister Maggie: She needs your support so she can play her part in saving democracy.

From a young age, Maggie and I (and our older sister, Franny) were encouraged to speak our minds. Every so often, our dad would peer up from his newspaper while we finished our cereal and ask, "What are you doing for freedom today?"

At the time, Franny and I didn't necessarily know what it would mean to lend aid and succor to a principle, albeit one of the pillars of democracy – we were just trying to eat breakfast and get to school – but it's clear now that Maggie took my father’s provocation to heart.

**Since winning her first election to the Senate, Maggie has worked to expand health care, safeguard access to abortion, and defend our democracy.** She's a bright light in politics: She knows how to listen to people and to work across the aisle to get things done.

**Look, we can't lose Maggie's voice in the Senate.** And I'm doing everything I can to ensure she wins her reelection, but I need your help. The GOP is spending millions to attack my sister, and she can only fight back if she has enough resources
**[_So please, will you do your part to keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue and rush a gift of $3 right now to protect our majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162345/349087494/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMThhNS0xYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d4IUu5L6SNjfN1nc7MMHd2LGFA4G0doaS--WsIxPKs=)**
Thank you for being with me on my sister's side.

Frank Wood
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162346/349087495/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMThhNS0xYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d4IUu5L6SNjfN1nc7MMHd2LGFA4G0doaS--WsIxPKs=)

subject: Help Get Dan On The Ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter,

We've got three days left to collect enough petition signatures to get Dan on the ballot.

Dan has been all over the district, and his candidacy for Congress is getting a great response. And now, we need YOUR help to make sure Dan is on the ballot.

Join Dan and the campaign THIS MONDAY, June 6, at 6:30 PM in the West Village for a special volunteer petitioning event. We will be working to blast past our signature goal! Sign up for details >>> [https://www.mobilize.us/dangoldmanfornewyork/event/467554/]

This is one of the most crucial phases of the campaign. If we don't collect enough signatures, Dan doesn't get on the ballot. And the more we collect, the stronger we will be moving toward the August election. We need your help to do this right.

If you have never gone petitioning before, don’t worry. We will host a short training session before you go out, and you won’t walk alone.

Hope to see you there!

Very grateful,
Team Goldman

RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dg_email_foundingdonor?refcode=em_gld_OTH_volpet_060522]

Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both.

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY

clean_body: Peter, We've got three days left to collect enough petition signatures to get Dan on the ballot. Dan has been all over the district, and his candidacy for Congress is getting a great response. And now, we need YOUR help to make sure Dan is on the ballot. Join Dan and the campaign THIS MONDAY, June 6, at 6:30 PM in the West Village for a special volunteer petitioning event. We will be working to blast past our signature goal! Sign up for details >>> [] This is one of the most crucial phases of the campaign. If we don't collect enough signatures, Dan doesn't get on the ballot. And the more we collect, the stronger we will be moving toward the August election. We need your help to do this right. If you have never gone petitioning before, don’t worry. We will host a short training session before you go out, and you won’t walk alone. Hope to see you there! Very grateful, Team Goldman RUSH A DONATION [] Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both. _**We upended the D.C. elites' playbook in this race to take back Nevada.**_ They thought their hand-picked puppet Adam Laxalt was going to walk into the nomination.

But our grassroots, Duty First campaign has D.C. elites scrambling to salvage my opponent's struggling campaign. They're flooding TV, Radio, and Social Media feeds with vicious attack ads spreading lies about my character.

They're seeing the same polling numbers we're seeing, and they know their only path to victory is to spend millions tearing me down and attacking my supporters. Outside special interest groups and Never Trump organizations have a blank check to blunt our momentum.

| | Folks, we are already only a couple weeks away from the runoff on Tuesday, June 21st and a week away from early voting starting June 13th. Our team is acting quickly to get our media & digital advertising plans up to full speed with our latest messaging. We’re filming new content, creating additional mailers, and pushing out our new ads – the district needs to know how much is at stake on June 21st! body:
Hey folks, Abby here checking in on the message you received from our team. We've seen more and more restrictive laws over the last few years, and many women are facing a world where they may have to travel out of state to exercise their right to choose with the privacy they deserve. As a member of Wiley’s fully female senior staff, I can attest to the fact that he will stand with us every step of the way. | | | Hey folks, Abby here checking in on the message you received from our team. We've seen more and more restrictive laws over the last few years, and many women are facing a world where they may have to travel out of state to exercise their right to choose with the privacy they deserve. **As a member of Wiley’s fully female senior staff, I can attest to the fact that he will stand with us every step of the way.** [**Can you contribute today to elect Wiley Nickel to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162832/349089645/913110414?refcode=220605-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE5ZTBjMi0yMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVto-bWImYYu1gu_IxVCT8m8kqbuqWuzHYE5tEGn3Sc=) Thank you, Abby [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162833/349089646/-370012521?refcode=220605-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE5ZTBjMi0yMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVto-bWImYYu1gu_IxVCT8m8kqbuqWuzHYE5tEGn3Sc=) _\----Forwarded-Message----_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46162834/349089647/913110414?refcode=220605-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE5ZTBjMi0yMmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVto-bWImYYu1gu_IxVCT8m8kqbuqWuzHYE5tEGn3Sc=) Peter, Reproductive rights continue to be a hot-button issue in our country’s politics.**A woman’s right to choose should be unabridged and unimpeded,** and yet the Republican Party simply will not allow that to happen. The Supreme Court is set to make a decision this summer on _Roe v. Wade_ , and if it gets struck down, we will need strong fighters in Congress to prevent further infringement on the rights and privacy of women in this country. Last month, Wiley was honored to be invited to speak at the Raleigh Bans Off Our Bodies Rally, where folks got out to make their voices heard despite the rain. Peter,

**Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes?**

_Not on my watch._

In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. **Here’s why:**

The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden **_BANS_** them, **he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them.**

**Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough!** [**See for yourself as I speak with Tucker Carlson on the subject:**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a595cd9096434dcd83ea092c4b668df5&_e=PJ76bS9d8Z5fI-0ascK-WNdlaaI7WnpRiGabxALwrdBDlK2dgL2C6SiurnuefH01RHVMrXsiulg1ZT4LNHhPhYydWiOo9l5miJjm3C6VZwrzOfMwK0ZUq5TOv9F3lxJHJWqCrjCZFgjb5MheZXFXVZxYhwb24jdVFFhx-G8WYiyVozbNMnAYL1m-Xnk7WuMCXOktW_fXBi5-0NVZSv_S44GYCMtv61vLPmw5Re64UVZvf05nv0UTKxLAufc0yCw9qf53Ten-EwrvlMBzhiGMW0KM_JAqBHgzQ8kObwN44iWQDURxZdJ3StVid2HL85i5AWqELfTu5qAsiEEvY_xV192EAOnD0lXSx1prc9aDn8yFpKJYr623c8YXbCTmgw6oNhsMBkQ5ndvyz7sKZZDQ9h0f9GKGuXseYH7lyldldQ78j7yThrFhE7P6ukIksac1fJjzhLeQozeDxuGWpaOoWg%3D%3D)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a595cd9096434dcd83ea092c4b668df5&_e=PJ76bS9d8Z5fI-0ascK-WNdlaaI7WnpRiGabxALwrdBDlK2dgL2C6SiurnuefH01RHVMrXsiulg1ZT4LNHhPhYydWiOo9l5miJjm3C6VZwrzOfMwK0ZUq5TOv9F3lxJHJWqCrjCZFgjb5MheZXFXVZxYhwb24jdVFFhx-G8WYiyVozbNMnAYL1m-Xnk7WuMCXOktW_fXBi5-0NVZSv_S44GYCMtv61vLPmw5Re64UVZvf05nv0UTKxLAufc0yCw9b0c0HT4cUVs09HoGAJc5p4YIdaZD6xzegBASq8XZZTP0kKaNgpIC_oRIS8atBa0AbKFmZbSVFjHwC_6-lyxm9yVI2RwQfwldEUMhbQuXWwrPN8pYjjPmXWG5zu1NGVWu4zl9yAiM2kRAVkFHiOmQ0CgE87NlHmsM5cN66IXIscp8caDpXfTu9BEPxkzt_Uo8mgFCohy_mdF0kFFTKX4t9A%3D%3D)
| [**CHIP IN TO SUPPORT MY EFFORTS**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a595cd9096434dcd83ea092c4b668df5&_e=PJ76bS9d8Z5fI-0ascK-WNdlaaI7WnpRiGabxALwrdBDlK2dgL2C6SiurnuefH01RHVMrXsiulg1ZT4LNHhPhYydWiOo9l5miJjm3C6VZwrzOfMwK0ZUq5TOv9F3lxJHJWqCrjCZFgjb5MheZXFXVZxYhwb24jdVFFhx-G8WYiyVozbNMnAYL1m-Xnk7WuMCXOktW_fXBi5-0NVZSv_S44GYCMtv61vLPmw5Re64UVZvf05nv0UTKxLAufc0yCw9DqhN7Hf35USZVesokPrC1ehIf4YJUCKcc8h4uhKd6P7gFvzxPncMgNQrAzEs_3Z7tBW5uriXxrVqUqGYSX7C4EWgyPFLXiCvBPOdwJ9tSOa3mWc-JiU0H_njdG2OwTOBB4wcgpmWacSaRaO7ykZXVo6i6HblIorNilT5J76GGiBVb4_38P3IB2lCZLWzlRW889IIifiOyRK8jlqQePLxmQ%3D%3D)

What blows my mind even more is that Democrats have spent **HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of dollars** for their personal use of heightened security and bodyguards. _But do you know what guns the bodyguards carry to protect them?_ **Ones that require more than a 10-round magazine.**

**I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games.** Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them.

[**So please, stand with me and support my efforts to protect our Second Amendment rights, but more importantly, the right you have to defend ourselves and our families.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a595cd9096434dcd83ea092c4b668df5&_e=PJ76bS9d8Z5fI-0ascK-WNdlaaI7WnpRiGabxALwrdBDlK2dgL2C6SiurnuefH01RHVMrXsiulg1ZT4LNHhPhYydWiOo9l5miJjm3C6VZwrzOfMwK0ZUq5TOv9F3lxJHJWqCrjCZFgjb5MheZXFXVZxYhwb24jdVFFhx-G8WYiyVozbNMnAYL1m-Xnk7WuMCXOktW_fXBi5-0NVZSv_S44GYCMtv61vLPmw5Re64UVZvf05nv0UTKxLAufc0yCw968zIbxQnyF7el_7rokPF2CWz5HOQqEsRdwcVlCTv-B_D6Z0YBqaDjTHcGd1qQVwvs5F-YCHTG2Bn9ZVKXHE5l_Wav_lwhpwBfw6llDzyTs08oF4M6uVfTLmn06m8nyWKQ73epUIFvHFDmJTw1eAqjSDxTV1dY1V9gBBPMdmwfutfcv4rUh7jq8jDnIptTdzlZfJ8s-jOaohtOW25G4nJew%3D%3D)

clean_body: Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough! | Peter, Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes? Not on my watch. In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. Here’s why: The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden BANS them, he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them. Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough! | What blows my mind even more is that Democrats have spent HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of dollars for their personal use of heightened security and bodyguards. But do you know what guns the bodyguards carry to protect them? Ones that require more than a 10-round magazine. I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games. Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them. I will never back down from the fight for your rights, For America, Greg Steube | Greg Steube has proudly served Florida's 17th Congressional District since 2019 and has been a steadfast warrior for the America First agenda. ---|--- Follow Me On Social Media The maximum amount an individual may contribute is $5,800. Dear Friends:
Thank you for your support during my recent campaign for Congress. I truly want to express my deep appreciation for all your assistance. As you will read below, I am returning to the organization I co-founded called The Athenai Institute. I hope you will take a few minutes to review our activities and consider making a [donation here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PMc6gixMuhz-gYSvcR-ctI1uDfVaDOjNAxEcYHcKzm4f_KgScFaCHSDjVHfl9D_f-vMfGyaZvl1bTGcMU1WW0Y3cDWTBPKUh_5AmCaVWLsrHO3a2HSRtXtgBbC95XEcm2qwR5EBqVu8Ah4RZVcGHMSdS2OyLtlcpfJ8etGKpv_7iM3jfCBzOBA==&c=2Uj5yJvCaC6HL4kgDuCNLKmB3FWx_LYAuD_L7iYkLSanELbJjKyhEA==&ch=qdoN51slTktfe6RPWWs7FtYc1AKzhVQI_fD4LtGJnIBNrFzwxZVNkg==) to our educational efforts regarding the human and religious rights violations by the Chinese Communist Party.
Again, thank you for your support both for my campaign and for the outstanding activities at The Athenai Institute. It has been the honor of a lifetime campaigning across the 10th district and meeting thousands of amazing Virginians.
May God Bless, Caleb

| FORMER CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE CALEB MAX RETURNS TO ATHENAI INSTITUTE
HONORS THOSE CHINESE STUDENTS KILLED AT TIANANMEN SQUARE 33 YEARS AGO
---
| | |
---|---
|
(Leesburg) - The Athenai Institute announced today that its' Co-Founder and the former Virginia 10th Congressional District Candidate, Caleb Max, will return to the organization.

The Athenai Institute is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization founded in May of 2020 to counteract Chinese Communist Party (CCP) influence on college campuses and advocating for universities to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs and other crimes against humanity.

"Today we mark the 33rd anniversary of the Chinese Communists massacre of pro-democracy students and leaders in Tiananmen Square" Caleb Max stated, "Due to the suppression of Chinese citizens by the Communist Party, no candles will be lit and no religious memorial services will be held in Beijing, Shanghai, Hong Kong or elsewhere in China to remember the thousands that were killed on June 4, 1989. The Communist Party ensures that all memories of that horrible event have been erased across the country. These individuals need to be remembered and honored and not removed from history."

"On the campaign trail I talked consistently about the threat of the Chinese Communist Party to our nation. Even though I cannot combat the CCP in Congress I will continue to advocate for the persecuted in China in the private sector. The Athenai Institute continues to be the best organization on college campuses alerting students on a bipartisan level about the Communist threat. I look forward to visiting campuses this Fall and getting universities to divest from the genocide occurring in China." Max added.

The Athenai Institute was formed as a bipartisan educational effort to address CCP's influence through their over 100 Confucius Institutes on US campuses and at over 500 universities worldwide. There has been significant progress in closing those CCP funded entities. In April of this year, the Athenai Institute joined with 31 other organizations as part of the nationwide Uyghur genocide university divestment movement.

The Institute released an [open letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PMc6gixMuhz-gYSvcR-ctI1uDfVaDOjNAxEcYHcKzm4f_KgScFaCHTtDieZYH8mkkrxDUBBQilwsdGn0PdYe7k_anYz9bJoLXaJGPGcq6GAjNbAm2AAFjDIrLqXE8ne9WPwvcGocrqK5ZVnmnzDYRM6-0JvggH0bXdZ9bxzZGIjgEzf2NxooLTWebOL8s4Nj-HVPGjjQYWW_9w0oB9tk8g==&c=2Uj5yJvCaC6HL4kgDuCNLKmB3FWx_LYAuD_L7iYkLSanELbJjKyhEA==&ch=qdoN51slTktfe6RPWWs7FtYc1AKzhVQI_fD4LtGJnIBNrFzwxZVNkg==) to the presidents and governing boards of all 50 United States flagship public universities calling on them to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs.

Athenai's letter was co-signed by national political leaders, including former U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley ([coverage here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PMc6gixMuhz-gYSvcR-ctI1uDfVaDOjNAxEcYHcKzm4f_KgScFaCHTtDieZYH8mkXHPFhHMHL94I7FjnOM-z4TKf9ddwa6EQK07Pi7t5IdVS-ddLcSrp27kXviXYv4yy2K5RPV9Md3bcmyRw0QNR-qq4OYLYLOgswC1-CH_eiK7VMA5tTqBzqXDTKV1Ds8kmeEBExmjPZADog8AH7Dc-VSa5Dwbc4DHB&c=2Uj5yJvCaC6HL4kgDuCNLKmB3FWx_LYAuD_L7iYkLSanELbJjKyhEA==&ch=qdoN51slTktfe6RPWWs7FtYc1AKzhVQI_fD4LtGJnIBNrFzwxZVNkg==)), former Under Secretary of State Keith Krach, Congresswoman Claudia Tenney (NY-22), Congressmen Mike Gallagher (WI-08) and Michael McCaul (TX-10), as well as by an ideologically diverse group of 31 other organizations united by their support for divestment. A copy of the letter was sent to each university, along with a specific list of entities targeted for divestment and the text of the Uyghur Genocide Divestment Pledge. The full text of the letter, pledge, and the full list of signatories can be seen [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PMc6gixMuhz-gYSvcR-ctI1uDfVaDOjNAxEcYHcKzm4f_KgScFaCHSDjVHfl9D_fuMor9CfDt-4ESLtcxZKj5BQk9rC5ATG7k4yVHk7_nmuCMGG-a8-bL5HKj3FYWQim7NPFpNfRJgR1Rb1MwD49Do8nNPmCyXiTIiJpGluDoGVu5aV0XznrZUmDEg6foHjNc_EZdR9INb2oINgClxXKXaQVJN8DRTDw46mhpVfmCee3hEo3_0a1IT3zvmboOTMVJYJ1u9w18qQ=&c=2Uj5yJvCaC6HL4kgDuCNLKmB3FWx_LYAuD_L7iYkLSanELbJjKyhEA==&ch=qdoN51slTktfe6RPWWs7FtYc1AKzhVQI_fD4LtGJnIBNrFzwxZVNkg==).

Catholic University in Washington became the first university to divest, Yale University is presently under a review process and grassroots student efforts have begun at Georgetown University, George Washington University, the University of Virginia, Cornell and UCLA.

"I look forward to the work ahead with the Athenai Institute and want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all those that participated in our Virginia 10th Congressional District nomination process. It was a privilege being one of the candidates and meeting so many caring individuals. Thank you." Max concluded.

-END-

I hope you will take a few minutes to review our activities and consider making a == to our educational efforts regarding the human and religious rights violations by the Chinese Communist Party. Again, thank you for your support both for my campaign and for the outstanding activities at The Athenai Institute. The Communist Party ensures that all memories of that horrible event have been erased across the country. These individuals need to be remembered and honored and not removed from history." "On the campaign trail I talked consistently about the threat of the Chinese Communist Party to our nation. Even though I cannot combat the CCP in Congress I will continue to advocate for the persecuted in China in the private sector. The Athenai Institute continues to be the best organization on college campuses alerting students on a bipartisan level about the Communist threat. I look forward to visiting campuses this Fall and getting universities to divest from the genocide occurring in China." Max added. The Athenai Institute was formed as a bipartisan educational effort to address CCP's influence through their over 100 Confucius Institutes on US campuses and at over 500 universities worldwide. There has been significant progress in closing those CCP funded entities. A copy of the letter was sent to each university, along with a specific list of entities targeted for divestment and the text of the Uyghur Genocide Divestment Pledge. The full text of the letter, pledge, and the full list of signatories can be seen ==. Catholic University in Washington became the first university to divest, Yale University is presently under a review process and grassroots student efforts have begun at Georgetown University, George Washington University, the University of Virginia, Cornell and UCLA. "I look forward to the work ahead with the Athenai Institute and want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all those that participated in our Virginia 10th Congressional District nomination process. Peter,

This weekend is **Wear Orange Weekend** , a day when people across the country wear orange to raise awareness of the impact of gun violence in our communities, and to remember the countless lives lost to senseless violence.

This year marks the 10 year anniversary of the Sandy Hook shooting, and after a decade of inaction, the recent shootings in Uvalde, Tulsa, and across the country make it clear it is far past time for comprehensive gun reform legislation.

[**We cannot wait another moment, so Emilia is demanding action to address gun violence across the United States. Will you stand with her in calling for common sense gun reform legislation by adding your name to our petition?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163289/349091455/-1766108079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZmODNlOC0yM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jzU9-DUoaiLxPBg9v4kPqTZyrDlT47hyKxnOCEjeH4=&emci=7be68c09-f6e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22ff83e8-23e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=11703046)

**Peter, the vast majority of Americans support common sense reforms to our gun laws, like expanding universal background checks on firearm sales.**

Yet instead of taking real common sense steps to address the plague of gun violence across the country, leaders here in Ohio have chosen to pass dangerous “Stand Your Ground'' regulations, eliminate safety and permit requirements for concealed carry, and even go as far as passing a law to arm teachers in schools.

Enough is enough: No one should live in fear of senseless gun violence, whether they’re at church, school, the hospital, the grocery store, or a nightclub.

[**In Congress, Emilia will always be a vote for gun violence prevention, and will stand firmly against the gun lobby and the politicians they fund. So please, can you join Emilia and add your name to our petition calling for common sense gun reform legislation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163291/349091457/-1766108079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZmODNlOC0yM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jzU9-DUoaiLxPBg9v4kPqTZyrDlT47hyKxnOCEjeH4=&emci=7be68c09-f6e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22ff83e8-23e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=11703046) [**Add my name >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163292/349091458/-1766108079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZmODNlOC0yM2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4jzU9-DUoaiLxPBg9v4kPqTZyrDlT47hyKxnOCEjeH4=&emci=7be68c09-f6e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22ff83e8-23e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=11703046)

body:
Please take a few minutes to share your thoughts. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163356/349091752/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQxZGM3NS0yNGU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCjxlo2PfT9lsiwOnzDG9Y0EqISIRBZy0d_K4O2S3qA=&emci=8b5279ae-1fe5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7dd1dc75-24e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=252045)
---
It’s been a tough couple of weeks, folks. But rest assured that I haven’t stopped working to build a better, safer future for New Mexico and our country. I’m focused on passing laws to protect women’s healthcare rights, finding a bipartisan solution to gun violence, and bringing forward legislation to help New Mexico respond to and recover from these historic wildfires. It’s important to me to hear what issues matter most to you. Will you take a moment to fill out my team’s June Priorities Survey? Your responses will help shape my strategy for the months ahead. clean_body: | Hey Peter, If you couldn’t tell from the lack of a subject line, I’m in a little bit of a rush today. We only have two days left until our primary Election Day, and I’m spending all my time out on the doors today talking to undecided voters about this critical House seat for Democrats. I just got a text from our finance director, Matthew, saying that we’re $2,200 behind our TV ads goal. I hope you know by now how crucial these proven-effective ads are in the final days of a race like ours. = | = Alright, I gotta run, but I can’t tell you how proud I am to have you on my team at such a critical moment. All the best, Phil Sent from iPhone (please excuse any typos) | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us defeat MAGA Republicans, make a=. subject: Mark Kelly SPEAKS OUT against the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Kelly just stunned us, Team
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_)._
---
**Team, Sen. Mark Kelly just stunned us:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Kelly/?source=VPP_20220605_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_) Team, Mark Kelly knows that Mitch McConnell’s Republicans will use the filibuster to BLOCK any and every bill that Democrats introduce.

_But if we can get a TIDAL WAVE of 50,000 Democrats_ who want to ABOLISH the filibuster, we’ll convince the Senate to get rid of this Jim Crow relic! [Listen, abolishing the filibuster is the only way to pass vital voting rights bills. Do your part and sign to ABOLISH the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Kelly/?source=VPP_20220605_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_) | **OFFICIAL ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER PETITION**
* * *
| [ADD YOUR NAME TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Kelly/?source=VPP_20220605_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_)
---
*** 50,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED | PETITION CLOSES AT 11:59PM ***
* * *
The GOP is using the filibuster to DESTROY Biden’s priorities and rig elections in their favor.

_We’re FURIOUS – because that means we get:_

❌ **NO** Voting Rights Bills
❌ **NO** Reproductive Rights Bills
❌ **NO** Gun Safety Bills

Senate Republicans REFUSE to act in good faith, Team. Instead, they’re using the filibuster to _sabotage_ progressive bills and _HUMILIATE_ President Biden...

**If Joe Biden can’t pass his agenda, not only will the people miss out on policies we desperately need -- we will LOSE our majorities in November!**
[Please Team, we’re asking 3 of our top supporters in your area to act now. SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Abolish_Filibuster_Kelly/?source=VPP_20220605_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_)
**OFFICIAL ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER PETITION**

*** 50,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED | PETITION CLOSES AT 11:59PM ***
* * *
_— VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=2986%2E878179%2Ez_W5W_).**

body:
| | | **URGENT: These THREE Republican senators urged the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- and we have a chance to unseat them ALL this November!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8272?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220605-AllGiftsTRIPLED-RoeGOPSlate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220605-AllGiftsTRIPLED-RoeGOPSlate-Pros-sl1&akid=4573%2E9716520%2EK3gBoR)
**[We’ve unlocked a rare TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH to fight back and defeat the most vulnerable anti-choice Republican senators. Chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to flip these seats blue and defend the right to choose >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8272?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220605-AllGiftsTRIPLED-RoeGOPSlate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220605-AllGiftsTRIPLED-RoeGOPSlate-Pros-sl1&akid=4573%2E9716520%2EK3gBoR)**

Team, when the Supreme Court first considered overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , **44 Republican Senators wrote to the Court BEGGING them to do it.**

But we can fight back now by defeating THREE of the _most vulnerable_ anti-choice Republicans who signed that letter: **Marco Rubio, Ron Johnson, and Rand Paul.**

We’ve activated an **emergency TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH** to help flip these seats blue and expand our razor-thin Senate majority -- _but not enough Democrats in Pennsylvania are taking advantage of this rare chance to TRIPLE their gifts!_ **Please, before midnight:**

I've fought my entire career to ensure patients have access to the health & reproductive care they need. That’s why the far-right is plotting to defeat me.

Caring for patients is what I’m called to do as a doctor. I took an oath to do no harm.

But the Supreme Court wants to harm patients seeking an abortion. They want to CRIMINALIZE a standard, safe medical procedure.

**We must do everything we can to stop them and protect _Roe._**

I know I’ve stressed how unique my seat is in Congress as one of the few Physicians. [But it’s why I’ll never stop fighting for abortion rights -- and why National Republicans will always have a target on my back.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6U--QmQ8EZU-MvA5b0GNz4X4ukj-sJRpQ9KG1hnvTR8OHFld4jvofwYGAlCkHAFmyF0EYK0MqEg61f9ASMSg7NKBBzKDUFwQhKf0cgJuD1z2sp7zIZqF7MIvHcrWkb1bAYv2-5HOYLWBR_7guC5GhLPiyehsTu-oCUDucvLO34cHMw0NBIMAwNH7CXAr2S3Hq-tnn3mTaFm08VAW-XMXuAzEpi801WIw6y7Tc3XL-x0E2hRxDIXW7_Tg8-qWBrbBPAziAJXEtMkVYJRKeFJXs7ZmqCOdgu2fPmzETYZcQGw0qtRW-YzGd4Mr5dOrxanzboiQlWCs0qV3H_DX0Z5vKNKoDnmOpUPYp0nZ5JPt-TqEcDM0iP1mrfnUtSqj_G1jzdIMhIiGpiPSReH7k6n6LuuHNqrYUDF8eK-HaufK05iglLJGL9-GbNIVkgfm7uJhYdLE_ZN05_s3H0XcHx5yBm4sJLDpcY2ZsQq1CWE76rKKk7kJMtJAFGgNWM8K91UGyu/3mn/K_UO_D_DQyOC6nbjHWkuAw/h8/S5vKE5ZT1LwfBByBNDJgEJoOQ7y4ZO-ZVgc1Nf-e6FU)

I stand ready to defend women’s right to choose and to ensure everyone can have a say in decisions that impact their bodies, lives, health, and futures.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | America is facing an unprecedented attack on Roe v. Wade. As a physician, I know what’s at stake. I am one of only three Democratic Physicians in Congress. I’ve seen first hand how important it is for patients to be able to access safe and legal abortion. I've fought my entire career to ensure patients have access to the health & reproductive care they need. That’s why the far-right is plotting to defeat me. | | | Caring for patients is what I’m called to do as a doctor. I took an oath to do no harm. But the Supreme Court wants to harm patients seeking an abortion. They want to CRIMINALIZE a standard, safe medical procedure. We must do everything we can to stop them and protect Roe. I know I’ve stressed how unique my seat is in Congress as one of the few Physicians. I stand ready to defend women’s right to choose and to ensure everyone can have a say in decisions that impact their bodies, lives, health, and futures. | | | | | | Together, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Hello,
In Ukraine, there is a war that can only be summed up as democracy being attacked by authoritarianism. Even everyday citizens haven taken up arms and are defending their democracy, tooth-and-nail.
Here at home, there’s been a much colder type of war between democracy and authoritarianism. We are lucky that January 6th ended with as little bloodshed as it did.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley because, for 36 years in the U.S. Navy, I fought for our democracy abroad, and I’ll fight for it every day here in the United States Senate.**
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are already raising money into Super PACs and campaigning against me here in Iowa. There’s one reason: The early polls show a close race, and Senate control is on the line. They know I’m the one who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.
In order to fight back and win, we need to raise another $200,000 before our critical fundraising deadline. **We’re still falling very short right now, but if grassroots donors like you give now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163649/349093993/-42398318?refcode=em20220605pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGJkZjFiMy0yYmU1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cV7zLiouUvoO7vHg1gx_dgK9J6IXFFxhDVIo07Ah-wo=)

It was a busy week in the Barrett Brigade. Check out the top stories of the week to stay up to date with the campaign. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=629d0b4e44820b4afcb15e9a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D629a236b91a6f715feec673f%26ss_email_id%3D629d0b4e44820b4afcb15e9a%26ss_campaign_name%3DBrigade%2BUpdates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-05T20%253A01%253A03Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=25iuCT_ejPPq1B1TmkfzoQXTSac%3D)

## **Campaign Update**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=629d0b4e44820b4afcb15e9a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2Fpfbid0JxGvn5fgLPihdhK3ArVj4HxWmCot2kJix6Cwu7ZgDtgAZvXWuijH9Y3AYtVd6SXzl%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=EOYREk1BYNXuWnvXjUtP-e6FcLU%3D) | | **MEMORIAL DAY IN THE 7TH DISTRICT** On Monday, I toured the district to honor our veterans for Memorial Day. I started the morning in Potterville - and I was honored to speak at the memorial service at the conclusion of the parade. From there, we went to Howell to spend time at the American Legion luncheon, then we went to Owosso for the unveiling of the Desert Storm Veterans Memorial highway sign. We ended the day by participating in the Owosso Memorial Day parade. Thank you for all who served, and those who made the ultimate sacrifice. Let us commit to honoring your memories every day as we fight to preserve the promise of America. [**SEE MORE HERE >>>**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=629d0b4e44820b4afcb15e9a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2Fpfbid0JxGvn5fgLPihdhK3ArVj4HxWmCot2kJix6Cwu7ZgDtgAZvXWuijH9Y3AYtVd6SXzl%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=EOYREk1BYNXuWnvXjUtP-e6FcLU%3D)
---
|
---
| | **BARRETT BILL TO SUSPEND SALES TAX ON GASOLINE PASSES SENATE** Last week, the Senate passed my bill that would suspend the sales tax on gas for three months this summer. This will help ease the burden at the pump for hard working families - with projected savings upwards of $0.50/gallon. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Biggest moment of this campaign so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
My mind is focused on the next 48 hours, Peter. On Tuesday, we'll face the biggest moment yet in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R): our primary election.

We set a goal to raise another $15,000 to mobilize voters and keep our ads up – and Peter, we're close to getting there, but we're still a bit short. If you can chip in a donation of any amount to power us through the primary, I'd sure appreciate it. Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163994/349096463/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1153-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Y5M2M2My0yY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA0V5vUs0cI8fYt6E-si70s5ojl3h3olpXuytDiqz7o=)**

When I first got into this race, I promised folks like you that _nobody_ would work harder than I would to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley, and that remains true. I _know_ what it takes:
I have already won one election against a man twice my age – and when I did, I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.

I'm so determined because the stakes remain _so high_ – for Iowans and for Americans everywhere. Sen. Chuck Grassley bears direct responsibility for _Roe v. Wade_ being on the chopping block. He's turned his back on working families in favor of wealthy elites and special interests. He's embraced the extremism of his party. To put it simply, he has changed: he is not the same man who Iowans first sent to Washington nearly FIVE decades ago.

We can and WILL defeat him, and when we do, our victory will virtually guarantee a Democratic Senate majority. But first, over these next 48 hours, I need this grassroots team to fight hard alongside me – and give this race everything you've got so we can win this primary and retire Sen. Grassley.

Please, ahead of our final and most important goal before the primary, chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us win:**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163995/349096464/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1153-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Y5M2M2My0yY2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA0V5vUs0cI8fYt6E-si70s5ojl3h3olpXuytDiqz7o=)**

Thank you,

Abby

clean_body: | | | My mind is focused on the next 48 hours, Peter. On Tuesday, we'll face the biggest moment yet in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R): our primary election. We set a goal to raise another $15,000 to mobilize voters and keep our ads up – and Peter, we're close to getting there, but we're still a bit short. If you can chip in a donation of any amount to power us through the primary, I'd sure appreciate it. Here's the best link to give: = When I first got into this race, I promised folks like you that nobody would work harder than I would to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley, and that remains true. I know what it takes: I have already won one election against a man twice my age – and when I did, I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. I'm so determined because the stakes remain so high – for Iowans and for Americans everywhere. Sen. Chuck Grassley bears direct responsibility for Roe v. Wade being on the chopping block. He's turned his back on working families in favor of wealthy elites and special interests. He's embraced the extremism of his party. To put it simply, he has changed: he is not the same man who Iowans first sent to Washington nearly FIVE decades ago. We can and WILL defeat him, and when we do, our victory will virtually guarantee a Democratic Senate majority. But first, over these next 48 hours, I need this grassroots team to fight hard alongside me – and give this race everything you've got so we can win this primary and retire Sen. Grassley. Please, ahead of our final and most important goal before the primary, chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us win:= Thank you, Abby | |

She also traveled the state with stops at the Hot Springs County Lincoln Day Dinner, a 30x30 presentation in Greybull, and the Washakie County Lincoln Day Dinner. On Monday, June 6th Congressman Jim Banks (IN-03) will be in Cheyenne with Harriet at 7:00 am at Little America for breakfast and discussion. Harriet will then head to Casper for a Campaign for Liberty event, return to Cheyenne for the Wyoming Stockgrowers Association candidate forum, and then back on the road to Glendo, Douglas, and Gillette! As we move into parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming! For Wyoming, Team Hageman --- **Around Wyoming! ** Harriet attended the Hot Springs County and Washakie County Lincoln Day Dinners. Both events had more than 100 people in attendance! It was great to see so many people getting engaged and supporting their local party. She also held a town hall in Newcastle – it was a great turnout with excellent discussion on the important issues of the day. --- --- --- --- --- --- Voter Contact! County leads across the state have been active -- from Evanston to Lander to Cheyenne to Cody! Door to door voter contact will be one of the most important aspects of our campaign between now and August 16th. If you are interested in helping, please contact Kael at [kael@hagemanforwyoming.com](mailto:kael@hagemanforwyoming.com "kael@hagemanforwyoming.com") for training so that you can reach voters in your city and area. It is vitally important that we have direct contact with as many voters as possible to ensure they will show up at the polls. clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It was a busy week on the campaign with Harriet appearing on both Real America’s Voice and Newsmax. She also traveled the state with stops at the Hot Springs County Lincoln Day Dinner, a 30x30 presentation in Greybull, and the Washakie County Lincoln Day Dinner. On Monday, June 6th Congressman Jim Banks (IN-03) will be in Cheyenne with Harriet at 7:00 am at Little America for breakfast and discussion. Harriet will then head to Casper for a Campaign for Liberty event, return to Cheyenne for the Wyoming Stockgrowers Association candidate forum, and then back on the road to Glendo, Douglas, and Gillette! As we move into parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming! For Wyoming, Team Hageman Around Wyoming! Harriet attended the Hot Springs County and Washakie County Lincoln Day Dinners. Both events had more than 100 people in attendance! It was great to see so many people getting engaged and supporting their local party. She also held a town hall in Newcastle – it was a great turnout with excellent discussion on the important issues of the day. Voter Contact! County leads across the state have been active -- from Evanston to Lander to Cheyenne to Cody! Door to door voter contact will be one of the most important aspects of our campaign between now and August 16th. If you are interested in helping, please contact Kael at mailto:kael@hagemanforwyoming.com "kael@hagemanforwyoming.com") for training so that you can reach voters in your city and area. It is vitally important that we have direct contact with as many voters as possible to ensure they will show up at the polls. EARLY VOTING BEGINS ON JULY 1st! Views From the Road In the News "Cheney Challenger Hageman to Newsmax TV: Cheney Doesn't Have Wyoming Values") "Hageman: Canada's Proposed Gun Law is American Leftists Dream") "Biden Continues Attacks on Wyoming Oil and Gas Jobs- Where's Liz Cheney?") Fellow Conservative,

**Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes?**

_Not on my watch._

In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. **Here’s why:**

The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden **_BANS_** them, **he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them.**

**Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough!** [**See for yourself as I speak with Tucker Carlson on the subject:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6d67ae9d314c4e2b956ead3a3efb02a1&_e=JOlF_0KGFQCxe9m7mqc0b7xOHyReTZy62IpK24bvcdwggBskfDa1R449UpvzsegeOI0EAaf1NMzymYcjlhPjV0KI_kFVT6Kt3wEuJoRmio0hEb6PeGvX-T7Ex7WZ6IOYgE8VLh9ZmIhY1pSwrumtE6LEagAnJhao0ZIp5kjnnWDluc-wQxbGTwMnwW6ZG60zLSNG4HBh5CKC19Ye1Gq6HaLr4Jr7JMRTH-aJK1NjGC8oVan2oCwVhRte9V1R06s8g48ANxvkHcFxi7R7KzmsQC__T76zfrQc9sZbQ-qBwbpEvLKoJUTus_AzyEYkGsrNVBAqzzxbrEU_zUwNmZ-KGaXx0X6horNBxSAfEAd9IDmrqH3YQ_s5QuU7o5i379pTJNWpAIE8lNeUkl_unb5QgTvqtFqwWegGi8mRzXpf65TYCWpm-Xgmwn3M2IebScAlb-PDk_PePZvGzR0KcDP09w%3D%3D)
