clean_body: Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough! | Fellow Conservative, Democrats plan to take away our guns AND control what we do in the comfort of our homes? Not on my watch. In a hearing discussing Joe Biden’s attempt to ban magazines of more than ten rounds of ammunition, I utilized my own firearms to show my colleagues that the legislation makes ZERO sense. Here’s why: The majority of guns you and I use every day to protect ourselves, our families, and our homes use magazines that are greater than ten rounds of ammunition, which isn’t that much. But if Biden BANS them, he might as well ban all of our guns because we won’t be able to load them. Biden and the Democrats are disarming law-abiding citizens, ripping away our protection and Second Amendment rights, and I’ve had enough! | What blows my mind even more is that Democrats have spent HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of dollars for their personal use of heightened security and bodyguards. But do you know what guns the bodyguards carry to protect them? Ones that require more than a 10-round magazine. I’m sick of the hypocrisy and the Democrats' games. Again and again, the elitist D.C. swamp imposes rules on every day Americans, but the rules never apply to them. name: Herschel Walker
subject: the deciding vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. |

---
Peter,

In 2021, Democrats narrowly won a pair of U.S. Senate races in Georgia, allowing President Biden to pass a $1.9 TRILLION spending package that most Americans believed wasn't needed.

This package was only made possible by one man: _**Senator Raphael Warnock.**_ His vote was the deciding vote on the bill.

Because of this and other votes for the disastrous Biden agenda, you can thank Senator Warnock for:
1. Surging gas prices
2. Higher meat prices
3. Skyrocketing rent
4. Increased utility bills

That's why when we continue to see news stories like the one below from _Axios_ , we feel the need to share them with you immediately:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Remember what the DCCC did when AOC won?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Early in 2019, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC)
announced that it would be blacklisting vendors, staffers, and
organizations that support primary challengers to Democratic incumbents —
officially putting the interests of a handful of corporate-backed,
conservative Democrats above the will of Democratic voters.

It was a shocking attempt to protect corporate incumbents by blocking
working-class progressives from a slew of critical campaign resources. The
Democratic establishment created this blacklist after AOC defeated the 4th
most powerful Democrat in the House. Why? Because House leadership didn’t
want to lose more primaries to Justice Democrats.

Two of our recruits, Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman, still defeated long-time

progressive primaries.

anti-abortion and pro-NRA Democrat Henry Cuellar against Justice Democrat
Jessica Cisneros. Pelosi said, “I support my incumbents. I support every
one of them.”

for — Cuellar voted against abortion rights, labor rights, AND worked to
block Build Back Better, all in the last two years. Those are huge parts
of the Democratic agenda. But Pelosi still backed Cuellar.

corporate profits and the status quo. Peter,

Dear Friend,
In just TWO DAYS we have to close our books for the next Maryland Campaign Finance Report and I need your help.
We are only 6 weeks from the Primary Date on July 19 and this deadline is very important as we plan our spending for the final weeks of the campaign.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, In just TWO DAYS we have to close our books for the next Maryland Campaign Finance Report and I need your help. We are only 6 weeks from the Primary Date on July 19 and this deadline is very important as we plan our spending for the final weeks of the campaign. I hope you've seen our television commercials running across the state and our signs going up on every major road from Western Maryland to the Eastern Shore and everywhere between. You have been a critical supporter of this campaign and I am asking for your help before this important deadline. Anything you can do will help us immensely with our planning as we enter the final stretch. | I could not have gotten where I am today without your unwavering support. I am truly humbled by your generosity. With your help, we can and will make history. Thank You, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

[1]Beto O'Rourke

After each mass shooting in Texas, Abbott has promised solutions but
provided none.

On the other hand, Beto is taking action. He is hosting town halls about
keeping our children safe — in Dallas, Austin, San Antonio, McAllen, and
Rio Grande City. He is bringing people together to make real change.

If we care about protecting the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want
every child in this state to be healthy and happy, then it’s clear we must
overcome and defeat Greg Abbott.

Beto will fight for the lives of those in our lives. As Governor, he will

City to discuss this critical issue and hear from those communities as
well.

body:
We must stand with Liz Cheney!
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf)._
---
**BREAKING: Republican National Committee votes to CENSURE Rep. Liz Cheney for her involvement with the January 6th investigation**

**We 're disgusted by the RNC** \- so we're gathering 25,000 good Democrats to sign our open letter thanking Cheney for her work on the committee!

_Unless we hit our 25,000 signature goal, Cheney could be SILENCED by the GOP ..._

[We can't let Republicans bully her! She needs to know that Americans do appreciate her bravery. SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/13913?t=7&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf) | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/13913?t=8&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf)
---

TO: LIZ CHENEY
FROM: A Proud Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU!

_Dear Congresswoman Liz Cheney,_

**While we don 't always agree with you, we truly appreciate your patriotic commitment to putting the country ahead of your party.**

It has been so refreshing to see a Republican who _REFUSES_ to bow down to Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA caucus.

**We 've seen Republicans attack you daily, strip you of your leadership position, and even threaten to throw you in jail! But you've been steadfast in your mission to follow the facts and protect our democracy - _we 're SO grateful!_**

**But I know that despite your noble actions, Republicans will continue to bully you into sabotaging the investigation and saving Donald Trump ...**

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of Americans across the country that stand with you! That 's why I'm signing this letter and chipping in $2 to Voter Protection Project to help elect more politicians who will stand with you in Congress and fight to protect our democracy.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/13913?t=9&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf) **_x. A GRATEFUL AMERICAN_** | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/13913?t=10&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=2968%2E878179%2EZe3SKf).**

# Tomorrow: Join Nancy Mace & Former White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney for Volunteer Happy Hour
##
Free Food, and anyone who signs up to volunteer gets a free drink!

**WHAT** : You're invited to join Congresswoman Nancy Mace for a Happy Hour tomorrow featuring former Trump White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney.

Food will be provided, and everyone who signs up to volunteer will get a round of drinks on us!

**WHEN:** Monday, June 6, 6PM to 7PM

**WHERE:** Saltwater Cowboys
130 Mill St, Mount Pleasant, SC
[Google Maps Link](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=ac99746b95&e=ddc57b5ede)

**WHY** : Show your support for Nancy Mace by turning out to grab a drink with the congresswoman and Mick Mulvaney. Sign up to volunteer for our final push

RSVP: [Sign up for the event at this link >>](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=c171298201&e=ddc57b5ede)

Let us know your shirt size and how you'd like to volunteer, and we'll see you at Saltwater Cowboys at 6PM!

Sincerely,
The Nancy Mace for Congress Team

name: NRSC Digital Team
subject: Re: The Supreme Court leakers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Justice Scalia once said to an incoming class of Supreme Court law clerks that “he would do ‘everything in [his] power’ to ‘ruin’ the career of any law clerk who betrayed his confidences.”

We have one very simple question for you: [**Do you believe that if it turns out to be an employee of the Supreme Court who leaked the draft reversal of Roe V. Wade they should be prosecuted to the full extent of federal law?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=477ad636a352496289c4a56dbd23c973&_e=ky8JTwNrIsxdl4kmLqVVSEvt6YcsVnOsKUc5XZ8AJesm6tQGwxgKm-m3g0uRCbJChIQL9PUxZi788ZGP8VEzk5jjEaMrLb_L1-SJGtzssrFGaFhMhTDBHIqfTaL4lfhVjh7JlSjFHFmKjkO3fZx8_iTqc2u2PibkcJF09SlN5V3HNls0b3gcRDgaH8die3b4Juc-IJgeodR8G0TpD_HOYVbV_TXrktyHZgXxtyfsdBV2JhA1h3NveVSkE6j0xw8oNTwJvNTZ0UEoIPa7W7JhX-hh1pYwZWpkyna9qpVmkqrErbyleA0oulJtMI_91ML2sq0dSWj_eKJFsmsk8Tt2v01kiqhgrhXGsQH7qk56EzqH8Gqj5NHpAWNzijL2hzDd7fHQ2G-whNrfrO4CRPl1ZriUmU9YyhPu87Z3KSaJVlNA1Drw0l6y9ut_TipMeaE8ptxGE4FYTql9LhOsPJgpGFh0Yk85MnxtFl2Si_R6_Md_P1orFpXEsT7-xrSWTLhk)

[**yes, prosecute crooks -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=477ad636a352496289c4a56dbd23c973&_e=ky8JTwNrIsxdl4kmLqVVSEvt6YcsVnOsKUc5XZ8AJesm6tQGwxgKm-m3g0uRCbJChIQL9PUxZi788ZGP8VEzk5jjEaMrLb_L1-SJGtzssrFGaFhMhTDBHIqfTaL4lfhVjh7JlSjFHFmKjkO3fZx8_iTqc2u2PibkcJF09SlN5V3HNls0b3gcRDgaH8die3b4Juc-IJgeodR8G0TpD_HOYVbV_TXrktyHZgXxtyfsdBV2JhA1h3NveVSkE6j0xw8oNTwJvNTZ0UEoIPa7W7JhX-hh1pYwZWpkyna9qpVmkqon-5GsbHpe9C1qGU4_OQkINIwzd_szlNWmDOTB64_v2ZEk3bgVKTGJr48UUIpMEtLoTHAZKNSxh3ir8P2pM-EtM0uasIOVIqFCYI-vJGaAjprnLK9nHzhl1u7spFnAqg_kPdi3Sr0R8GEXuDj7zYSxmoWKoCtgj7i_QMS5nTxAkm8rw28Z-M0UmoF53LANbqDFcN3HgnJM-CJN120cwxdq)
[**no, let them off the hook -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=477ad636a352496289c4a56dbd23c973&_e=ky8JTwNrIsxdl4kmLqVVSEvt6YcsVnOsKUc5XZ8AJesm6tQGwxgKm-m3g0uRCbJChIQL9PUxZi788ZGP8VEzk5jjEaMrLb_L1-SJGtzssrFGaFhMhTDBHIqfTaL4lfhVjh7JlSjFHFmKjkO3fZx8_iTqc2u2PibkcJF09SlN5V3HNls0b3gcRDgaH8die3b4Juc-IJgeodR8G0TpD_HOYVbV_TXrktyHZgXxtyfsdBV2JhA1h3NveVSkE6j0xw8oNTwJvNTZ0UEoIPa7W7JhX-hh1pYwZWpkyna9qpVmkqp7ZHIHNmU2dV1w5VwSs4nIakI4BEZlIZZqRHZ5rw27kZoJBt5jKqbL44aF80Moi3gCpxTuzEaEtWGnzggRCYmtgPmenhpuAZkb6QnD4mb7NGSiQE62myK2gAyU37UomOTwrM6MilGp8Ax8AKYv5xSuSG6WZO46FZd4caEj0mp7DY_UXJsxwhLOIPwLq_jvzPBLZwxwKUTmglw5LvrzIqap)
Once again, as is becoming increasingly typical, the Supreme Court, or matters closely related to the court, is becoming the focal point of this year’s midterm elections.

Dems are raising MILLIONS of dollars to save their Senate majority in hopes that they can rebuild their liberal majority on the Court. We’re of the belief that DEMS don’t mind the leak but are instead grateful that the news from the Supreme Court helped to super charge their fundraising mere months before voters start filling out their general election ballots.

[**Let us know where you stand on all of this by taking our brief survey today.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=477ad636a352496289c4a56dbd23c973&_e=ky8JTwNrIsxdl4kmLqVVSEvt6YcsVnOsKUc5XZ8AJesm6tQGwxgKm-m3g0uRCbJChIQL9PUxZi788ZGP8VEzk5jjEaMrLb_L1-SJGtzssrFGaFhMhTDBHIqfTaL4lfhVjh7JlSjFHFmKjkO3fZx8_iTqc2u2PibkcJF09SlN5V3HNls0b3gcRDgaH8die3b4Juc-IJgeodR8G0TpD_HOYVbV_TXrktyHZgXxtyfsdBV2JhA1h3NveVSkE6j0xw8oNTwJvNTZ0UEoIPa7W7JhX-hh1pYwZWpkyna9qpVmkqqrE2TLuylTgkgiY24NtWyj-CS9r8I381z4or1Xj6PKz1qkkTnhYLcGMWGxdupfyUafnEqJkXXiJsQXt8SUi5Jgljzer29wpPTH2tLEFu7q1QdLGr0XJBRzCMYvGfYliOA9mYXzbWRiaJZ7wy8qJXzZWRsNMEAJ_udSk7MDen_5kBK-fXOvEeVb1KQNe6lkTUDF0uTie40T0sOaAPJu2_w5)

Thank you,

NRSC Digital Team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: Endorsed by NARAL Pro-Choice America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=87e1a5234c&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Did you see the big news yesterday, Peter?

Our campaign just won the sole endorsement of _NARAL Pro-Choice America_ , one of the largest and most prominent reproductive freedom advocacy organizations in the country.
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=9dc34b278e&e=292fde286a)
---
| And with _Roe v. Wade_ under siege in Washington, this critical endorsement couldn’t have come at a more pivotal time.

In the Assembly, I’ve stood up for safeguarding abortion rights, and I’m proud to have been named a _NARAL_ _“Reproductive Freedom Leader”_ for my unwavering support for pro-choice legislation.

With the extreme right-wing majority on the U.S. Supreme Court poised to roll back the clock on a woman’s constitutional right to choose, it’s more important than it has ever been to have leaders in Congress with the experience and determination to protect access to care and fight back against every effort to restrict or criminalize it.

That’s what I’ve built my career around in the Assembly and it’s what you can count on from me as your next member of Congress: I’ll always protect the legal right to abortion. Full stop.

It is a profound honor to have the trust and sole support of _NARAL Pro-Choice America_.

Thank you,

Kevin Mullin
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Two More Days! We’re So Close & We Can Win - Brice Wiggins for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
It’s time to show NO-SHOW Palazzo the door by showing up to vote on June 7. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates-9078097?e=698f056321)
---
_It’s essential that our supporters make it to the polls on Tuesday. We need for you to vote and encourage your friends and family to do the same. Please text or share the red graphic above with anyone in the District._ _**DIRECTIONS:** On mobile, hold your finger on the image and it will allow you to share or save the image to your photos. On the desktop, you can drag or right-click to save it! Please call the campaign line at [**(601) 345-3420**](tel:+16013853420) or email [**info@bricewiggins.ms**](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms) if you need assistance._
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=81cf65831b&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
## A Special Thank YOU,
I want to tell you all how much I appreciate your support and thank you for standing by me throughout this highly contested race. Seven people are currently running, which to me, shows how much our current representative is out of touch and failing the people of Mississippi.It's time to show “NO-SHOW Palazzo” the power of the people by showing up to vote on June 7. I humbly ask for your vote on Tuesday.
|
---
_**"This is the people's seat...every 2 years, it's the PEOPLE who get to decide who they want to do the job."**__**–Sen. Brice Wiggins**_
|
---
### Brief Response to Palazzo Campaign:
While on the road traveling the district yesterday, I got word about a “hit piece” attacking us along with Mr. Wagner and Sheriff Ezell. The only thing I will say about this is that desperate politicians do desperate things when they know they are losing.South Mississippi deserves better than a do-nothing Congressman who is willing to lie about good Republicans who have been on the front lines while he’s in D.C. hiding from voters.The other candidates and I have been working hard to earn your votes this election. On the other hand, the incumbent [**refuses to debate**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4035346b68&e=698f056321) , will not talk about issues, and fails to acknowledge his dismal voting record. Enough is enough.I hope you will vote on Tuesday and send a message to Washington, DC: **It’s time to fire Palazzo and Pelosi, vote BRICE WIGGINS.**
## Campaign Trail Highlights
| | | | | |
## Walkin’ with Wiggins
[**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5d10192dcd&e=698f056321) for highlights and a few laughs from this week’s door-to-door adventures in Biloxi, Vancleave, Wayne County, and more across South Mississippi!
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f6a229ff58&e=698f056321)
---
## Mississippi Professional Firefighters Endorsement
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
"We applaud Senator Brice Wiggins’ dedication to First Responders, and we support his election campaign for the U.S. House of Representatives."- [**Professional Firefighters Association of Mississippi**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1745d8776f&e=698f056321) Firefighters put their lives on the line for us every day. It’s time someone fights for them and the voices of all First Responders in DC. [**As Congressman, First Responders will always come first.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0194082153&e=698f056321)
| | | | | | As Senate Chairman of the Mississippi Legislative First Responders Caucus, I wanted to share some [**examples**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c63b95b774&e=698f056321) of my steadfast support of the law enforcement community during my time in the legislature. [**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4e014add24&e=698f056321)**on how I will stand up for First Responders and Law Enforcement!**
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=93e62d4c2a&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ab2c1fa02b&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Ingalls Visit
I said a big thank you to the world's best shipbuilders [**early one morning**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3d6de8fc84&e=698f056321) this week! Julius Wiggins, my grandfather, welded here in WWII. I grew up with Huntington Ingalls Shipbuilding outside my window. **Mississippi’s 4th District is one of the best Congressional Districts in the nation and I will boldly fight to keep it that way!**
---
| | | | | |
## Picayune Senior Fair
What a great day visiting with everyone at the 2022 Senior Fair & Expo in Picayune hosted by WRJW Radio! Loved seeing local [**seniors connecting**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=104d2b5b24&e=698f056321) again while finding more resources to improve their quality of life!
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=97e7990766&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=01c52c4374&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Blessed Morning!
The Methodist Men of FUMC Pascagoula and Eastlawn United Methodist Church joined together for breakfast today. Thanks to Chief Justice Mike Randolph for sharing his Christian message & the success of the state's intervention courts, which he's championed. [**It's been my honor to work to see such things accomplished.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1cbfb9e6e9&e=698f056321) As a public servant, my (our) Christian faith is part of who we are and is not checked at the door, but rather informs the decisions that we make. As humans, we are far from perfect. Veteran courts, mental health courts, and drug courts assist where we as humans fall short. (The state saves money, too!) Thank you to Shannon Strunk for his leadership on this.
---
|
---
## Final Note...
The overwhelming majority of Americans believe our country is headed down the wrong path both at home and abroad. Palazzo has had 12 years of failed efforts to make a difference, and things have gotten worse on his watch.I'm asking the people of South Mississippi to rise above the noise and the clutter of our broken politics and to embrace that great faith and optimism that has always been that central ingredient in the American character - **Vote Wiggins on June 7 (TUESDAY)!** I will deliver results for the hardworking people of South Mississippi. Together, we can get America back on track!
Sincerely,
|
---
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=79e0806d30&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ba7048fb46&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e62642b052&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f58f4532c4&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=789a1012a3&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---|---
|
---
## IN THE MEDIA
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a7e22f1635&e=698f056321)
---
|
### WLOX News This Week
Watch my interview with Dave Elliott [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7490b2f279&e=698f056321).
---
| | | | | |
### Brown Water Banter
I sat down with [**Brown Water Banter Podcast**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0b0e3204a2&e=698f056321) to discuss topics ranging from Star Wars, Medical Marijuana, the Wind Pool, and why I set out to become your next U.S. Congressman. [**WATCH HERE.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=788c863207&e=698f056321)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8beb3a7472&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8da6351bba&e=698f056321)
---
|
### Paul Gallo Interview
Listen [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=11b9587248&e=698f056321) to learn how I will put those I represent in Congress first, unlike our current representative currently in DC.
---
| | | | | |
### Congressional Interview with Shea Dobson - [WATCH HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3a9d3c926a&e=698f056321)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=fe347c3b48&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
## Primary & General Election Day Reminders
| | | | | |
---
|
## Volunteers Needed!
Join the fight to get America back on track by volunteering on Election Day. [**CLICK HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=02172a8949&e=698f056321) to sign-up or call [**601-385-3420**](tel:+16013853420).
---
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
The Mississippi Secretary of State’s office released the following election reminders as you plan to go vote on Tuesday:
* **Mail-In Absentee Voting Deadline:** All Primary and General Election mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked by June 7th and received by County Circuit Clerk Offices within five business days of June 7th in order to count.
* **Polling Place Location** : [**CLICK HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7857f11de1&e=698f056321) to find your voting place. Please contact your County Circuit Clerk’s Office or local Election Commissioners to verify your polling place.
* **Voter Photo ID** : Voters are required to show photo identification at the polls. A voter without an acceptable form of photo identification is entitled to cast an affidavit ballot. [**CLICK HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=49d042d2fc&e=698f056321)**** to view a list of acceptable photo IDs.
* **Campaigning** : It is unlawful to campaign for any candidate within 150 feet of any entrance to a polling place, unless on private property.
* **Loitering** : The polling places should be clear for 30 feet from every entrance of all people except elections officials, voters waiting to vote, or authorized poll watchers.
* **Camera Phones** : Voters are prohibited from taking pictures of their marked ballot.

|
---
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1f5200ec76&e=698f056321)
---
|
---

name: Team Schiff
subject: Adam is doing everything he can to protect our House majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

We're capping off a fantastic weekend of voter outreach before Tuesday's
California jungle primary.

Folks are letting Adam know their top concerns — from the skyrocketing
cost of living and gas prices, to how we can get more of President Biden's
agenda passed through the Senate.

It's clear that we have to keep our House Majority. It’s the driving force
of this Congress and the most important originator of key progressive
legislation.

We’re about to kick off our final get-out-the-vote efforts before primary
day on Tuesday. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]To ensure our efforts are a success, please pitch in
$10 or any amount you can today. Every dollar goes toward winning this
jungle primary and defending our House majority.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2022_abs_em.2a1SBO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2022_abs_em.DoGQ0c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2022_abs_em.P8MHmG&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We're also hearing a lot about what a terrible Speaker Kevin McCarthy
would be. Everyone is fully aware of exactly who he is: A puppet for
Donald Trump.

He’s made it clear that if he became Speaker, he’d do everything in his
power to remove Adam from his committees specifically because of how Adam
has stood up to Trump.

Not to mention, McCarthy would prioritize some of the GOP’s most unpopular
policies like raising taxes on low income families, restricting voting
rights, destroying abortion access, and protecting the gun industry from
any reform. Under his reign, it wouldn’t be the people’s Congress — it
would be Trump’s.

We're doing everything we can to prevent that from ever happening. But
Adam needs your support for this final push before his election. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]Can
you pitch in?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2022_abs_em.2a1SBO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=318%2E5257348%2EvLsgkJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

We're not taking a single voter for granted in this election. We’ve got an

Thank you for supporting Adam in this important fight.

| | Es bueno ser demócrata y miembro de la comunidad LGBTQ+. Lo siento más que nunca durante el mes del orgullo. Nací al principio de la edad de oro de la comunidad LGBTQ+. En realidad no fue dorada, sino más bien la edad en la que decidimos no aguantar más basura, así la superamos. Tenía 9 años cuando Stonewall inició una revolución. Tenía 12 años cuando la homosexualidad fue retirada de la lista de enfermedades mentales. Cumplí 20 años cuando se detectó el primer caso de sida. A medida que pasaba el tiempo siempre me animaba el espíritu y la fuerza de la comunidad gay. Cuando la vida nos daba limones, hacíamos margaritas. No había nada que pudiera detenernos o desanimarnos. Ese espíritu nunca ha sido más fuerte. Como fuerza social, hemos protegido a los que no tienen derecho a voto y hemos fortalecido la Constitución, acercándonos cada vez más a la verdadera igualdad de derechos para todos.
---
| It is good to be a Democrat and member of the LGBTQ+ community. I feel this more than ever during PRIDE month. I was born at the beginning of the golden age for the LGBTQ+ community. It wasn’t actually golden, but more like we aren’t going to take any more sh*t so get over it age. I was 9 years old when Stonewall started a revolution. I was 12 when homosexuality was delisted as a mental disease. I turned 20 when the first AIDS case was diagnosed. As time moved on I was always uplifted by the spirit and strength of the gay community. Whenever life threw us lemons we made margaritas. There was nothing that could hold us back or keep us down. That spirit has never been stronger. As a social force we have protected the disenfranchised and strengthened the constitution getting ever closer to true equal rights for everyone.
---
| | |
---
| | El Departamento de Policía de Yakima es un punto de orgullo para mí y cuento su historia por todo el distrito. Hoy he participado en mi primer paseo y mi opinión se ha confirmado 10 veces. Una fuerza de trabajo profesional dedicada a mantener a nuestros ciudadanos seguros. Estoy familiarizado con el alcance que hacen a la juventud, las pandillas, la violencia doméstica, y más. Este trabajo que hacen muestra cuánto se preocupan por la comunidad; van más allá de la gestión de los delitos e invierten en la comunidad para mantenernos en el buen camino con apoyo, un suave empujón y, a veces, una mano firme. Gracias. The Yakima Police Department is a point of pride for me and I tell their story all up and down the district. Today I went on my first ride along and my opinion was confirmed 10 fold. A professional workforce dedicated to keeping our citizens safe. I am familiar with the outreach they do to youth, gangs, domestic violence, and more. This work they do shows how much they care about the community; they go beyond handling crimes and invest in the community to keep us on the right path with support, a gentle nudge, and sometimes a firm hand. Thank you
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | Rod's House me permitió hacer una visita esta semana y demostró una vez más lo comprensiva que son nuestras comunidades. Rod's House comenzó con una casa donada por Comprehensive Health y ahora este refugio para jóvenes ha crecido a 6 lugares y ha ampliado sus servicios. Ser socio para una comida es una buena manera de involucrarse y devolver la mano. Cocinar una comida para 30 personas (no es tan difícil como se piensa) y ayudar a los jóvenes necesitados. Algo en lo que no había pensado antes, pero muchos no tienen un lugar cómodo y seguro para relajarse, aunque sea por un rato. Rod's House gave me a tour this week and proved again how caring our communities are. Rod's House Started with a home donated by Comprehensive Health and now this safe haven for youths has grown into 6 locations and expanded its services. Being a Meal partner is a good way to get involve and give back. Cook a meal for 30 people (not as difficult as you might think) and help youths in need. I learned about "soft seating". Something I had not thought of before, but many do not have a comfortable and safe place to relax, if only for a short while.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---

name: JD Vance
subject: Liberal Agenda Crusher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Support my friend, Ted Budd!

Friend,

I’m reaching out to ask for your support of my friend and fellow Swamp-fighter, Ted Budd. Ted is a staunch conservative, a gun store owner, a family man, and most important: a Liberal Agenda Crusher. | [**JOIN ME IN SUPPORTING TED BUDD!**](http://links.buddfornc.com/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=709e71c59d0f401f9a5e9e0770e16e2e&_e=fQqMDbHiYurfgg8NlrJFg81yBpnlFk68qbJGQFsxFDMjF-02U5xV7gErpX6oXNCk6R4bWQrnduDZs7SYV1Q7ssN76Pduw4kYNDIzS7JvHp67K-9DoF6-mWm1pfg0ncEfC43Fgb0WdAbqvdCKxdCPxTBGuUPdSPFeRADCSHSy_nrrWebIXqbKVkC0AS5lQ3o3k93KAuGO9EgSVyFTAe8f5v6gb8S2wAMMAs1xQswDDSy39aRF6RAu-knjEtq6m7tl69rXMNbSoBJgNRpqdKudDoEnY4v3Gh7Nn-w-vpuZB95WZNWVS1SBXgeJE_GmIFt6jXRM8lf56Dl8Kro0_RMTIbFwTfU83o7mnD9IcP-qDHZVzhQkcu338KJDdGFnLjZPgrlKUb-V8smLpRzVMRUcL87skZ_SuzwyZc4Yf6nigR0i2b6rFL8NG9_APCtMOlM7zOufKbyE5L2whzaTK1s8hsjIhk6nysW4yDw9HdvI08NxTHz2I3F37cglhgiwvU35CWiIjJpUQKMqdoi8V7lx4NuF3aZRIh1Kpr2iBcRXswI%3D)
---

**Ted is running for the U.S. Senate to fight for America First and crush Biden’s Build Back Broke agenda.** While the Left thinks that we’re all racists, sexists, and bigots, we know that we’re the party of freedom, hard work, and AMERICA First. They can protest all they want, but we won’t cave to the woke mob.

**President Trump endorsed Ted Budd, saying “he’ll fight like nobody fights,” and I couldn’t agree more.**

If we don’t take back the Senate, the Democrats will ramp up their pro-abortion extremism, open-border policies, and out-of-control spending. Make no mistake: their agenda wrecks our communities, brings drugs across our borders, and encourages illegal immigration and violence.

**I need you to join me in supporting Ted Budd now.**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: What Pride month means to me
body:
| | |
---
**I’m an openly gay Democrat running against a Republican that voted NO on the Equality Act.

[ Donate to help me GET OUT THE VOTE ahead of the June 7 California primary. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163445/349092403/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjBlOTk4My0yN2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPcnxhaFk0PjX3h6_QVLYjkNFaF4WGUwmDUK-zOtces=)**
---
I waited until I was in my late 20s to come out as gay. I feared that if I showed my true identity in the small town I grew up in, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against.
With bills like Don’t Say Gay and the criminalization of treatment for trans youth, it’s more important than ever that I say _loud and proud_ that I’m an openly gay candidate running for Congress.
When politicians like Rep. Jay Obernolte vote NO on the Equality Act, they’re telling Americans that it should be perfectly legal to fire employees and evict tenants just because of who they love. **I’m running to defeat Obernolte because _no one_ should be afraid to live their life as their true and authentic self. For those who can’t be out yet, I’ll always fight for you.**
**[Ballots are due in the June 7 California primary in just a few days, and I need your help to win this race. Can you donate to help me GET OUT THE VOTE today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163446/349092404/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjBlOTk4My0yN2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPcnxhaFk0PjX3h6_QVLYjkNFaF4WGUwmDUK-zOtces=)**
---
[**Donate Now**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163447/349092405/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjBlOTk4My0yN2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPcnxhaFk0PjX3h6_QVLYjkNFaF4WGUwmDUK-zOtces=)
---
Record-high majorities of the American people accept LGBTQ+ Americans like me. But the Republican Party now represents a small minority that makes us culture war targets for political gain. States are targeting transgender youth as discrimination and violence rise, especially against trans people and trans people of color. **I need your help to defeat an anti-LGBTQ+ Republican. In Congress, I’ll work to pass the Equality Act and fight discrimination. But first, my people-powered campaign needs your help to win.** **[We’re just days away from the California primary, and we need your help to GET OUT THE VOTE. Can you donate $10 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46163448/349092406/-159340490?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220601_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjBlOTk4My0yN2U1LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPcnxhaFk0PjX3h6_QVLYjkNFaF4WGUwmDUK-zOtces=)** Thanks for standing up. – Derek Marshall

clean_body: | | | I’m an openly gay Democrat running against a Republican that voted NO on the Equality Act. = I waited until I was in my late 20s to come out as gay. I feared that if I showed my true identity in the small town I grew up in, I would be judged, rejected, or discriminated against. With bills like Don’t Say Gay and the criminalization of treatment for trans youth, it’s more important than ever that I say loud and proud that I’m an openly gay candidate running for Congress. When politicians like Rep. Jay Obernolte vote NO on the Equality Act, they’re telling Americans that it should be perfectly legal to fire employees and evict tenants just because of who they love. I’m running to defeat Obernolte because no one should be afraid to live their life as their true and authentic self. For those who can’t be out yet, I’ll always fight for you. = = Record-high majorities of the American people accept LGBTQ+ Americans like me. But the Republican Party now represents a small minority that makes us culture war targets for political gain. States are targeting transgender youth as discrimination and violence rise, especially against trans people and trans people of color. I need your help to defeat an anti-LGBTQ+ Republican. In Congress, I’ll work to pass the Equality Act and fight discrimination. But first, my people-powered campaign needs your help to win. = Thanks for standing up. – Derek Marshall | | | = | | P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416) | | | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Progressives are winning and we can keep winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, this is huge:
**Four progressive candidates that I endorsed — Summer Lee (PA-12), Andrea Salinas (OR-06), Greg Casar (TX-35), and Jasmine Crockett (TX-30) — won their Democratic primaries last month!** Two other candidates — Jessica Cisneros (TX-28) and Michelle Vallejo (TX-15) — are locked in races that are too close to call.
**And we have**** _more_****primaries coming up for Donna Edwards (MD-04), Maxwell Alejandro Frost (FL-10), Robert Garcia (CA-42), Sydney Kamlager (CA-37), and Delia Ramirez (IL-03).**
Progressives are winning and we can keep winning. But it's going to take all of us coming together to support the progressives I've endorsed so they can fight back against any special interest spending sure to come their way. [**Can you chip in $3 to help us elect these people-first leaders so we can hold our Democratic majority in the House and expand our movement for progress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13981?refcode=em20220605-1322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)_Your donation also helps power my own re-election campaign — any amount makes a big difference:_
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13981?refcode=em20220605-1322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)**
If this past year has taught us anything, it's that ceding our majority to an extreme right-wing GOP simply isn't an option — not with so much on the line.
If we're going to support our communities and working families, we need to make progress on our bold agenda — lowering the costs of prescription drugs, expanding access to health care through Medicare for All, affordable housing and childcare, humane immigration reform, real action on climate, gun reform, and so much more. **That's why it's critical we protect our Democratic majorities AND expand the number of House members that these transformative policies.**
[**Peter, we've come too far to let up now. Chip in $3 or any amount you can afford to fuel our electoral organizing in the months to come.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13981?refcode=em20220605-1322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13981?refcode=em20220605-1322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
P.S. Want to help us get out the vote for Delia Ramirez? [**Team Pramila is excited to host our first in-person phonebanking session on Thursday, June 9th from 3:30-6:30 PM PT!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13984?t=23&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b) You're invited to join us at our headquarters in Belltown as we make calls to voters in Illinois' new 3rd Congressional District.
P.P.S. Don't live in Seattle or can't make it in-person? [**RSVP here to make calls for Delia with us from**** _anywhere_****starting at 6:00 PM CT!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13985?t=24&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220605-1322-footer&t=25&refcode2=1322_420207_f2g76b&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=26&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1322%2E420207%2Ef2g76b)
